initialIdea: A website about the universe. space. dark. infinite zoom. animations. cool and mysterious vibe.

iterations.title: Initial Gen, Fix & Suggest
iterations.generatedRawHtml:
", "replace_with": " The Infinite Expanse - A Cosmic Journey

The Infinite Expanse

You are adrift in the endless ocean of spacetime. Before you lies a journey through scale and wonder. Use your mouse wheel or arrow keys to begin.

The Local Group

Galaxies are not solitary islands. They cluster together, bound by gravity. This is our cosmic neighborhood, home to Andromeda, Triangulum, and our own Milky Way.

Andromeda Galaxy

A majestic spiral, twice the size of the Milky Way, containing a trillion stars. It's on a collision course with us, but the cosmic dance won't begin for another 4.5 billion years.

Stellar Nursery

Within galaxies lie vast clouds of dust and gas, like the Orion Nebula. These are stellar nurseries, where intense gravity forges new stars and planetary systems from cosmic chaos.

A New System

A young, fiery star ignites, its gravitational pull shaping the protoplanetary disk around it. From this dust and debris, new worlds are born, each with its own story.

The Journey Continues

From the infinitely large to the infinitesimally small, the patterns repeat. The universe is a story of scale, and this is just one path. The exploration is endless.

Scroll to explore

The Infinite Expanse

You are adrift in the endless ocean of spacetime. A journey through scale and wonder awaits. Use your mouse wheel or arrow keys to begin the descent.

The Local Group

suggestedFeatures: STABILIZATION: Refactor the visual engine by replacing the inefficient, multi-layered SVG starfield with a single, high-performance HTML5 Canvas-based starfield that includes a parallax effect. Additionally, implement touch-based swipe controls (swipe up/down) to make the core zoom functionality fully accessible and intuitive on mobile and tablet devices.

STABILIZATION: Enhance the existing content presentation by replacing the abstract CSS `.visual` placeholders with high-resolution, actual astronomical images or looping videos for each level (e.g., Andromeda Galaxy, Orion Nebula). Also, implement a robust event handling mechanism for the scroll/zoom interaction, replacing the basic time-based throttle with a more reliable technique like `requestAnimationFrame` to prevent animation stutter on high-refresh-rate screens and sensitive trackpads.

NEW FEATURE: Implement interactive 'Points of Interest' within each zoom level. Add 2-3 small, glowing, clickable hotspots onto the background image of each level. Hovering over a hotspot will reveal a tooltip with a name (e.g., 'Supernova Remnant'), and clicking it will open a modal window displaying a short paragraph and key facts about that specific celestial object, transforming the experience from passive viewing to active exploration.

NEW FEATURE: Introduce a 'Cosmic Scale Navigator' UI element. This would be a vertical bar on the side of the screen that visually represents the entire zoom journey, from the Local Group down to a Solar System. It will highlight the user's current level and allow them to click on other levels to jump directly to them, providing a clear sense of scale and enabling non-linear exploration.

NEW FEATURE: Develop a dynamic and ambient soundscape using the Web Audio API. The audio should be generative and context-aware, shifting its tone and complexity as the user zooms through different levels. For example, a deep, low hum for intergalactic space, ethereal choir-like sounds inside a nebula, and subtle solar flare crackles near a star. This will dramatically increase immersion and fulfill the 'mysterious vibe' requirement.

", "replace_with": " The Infinite Expanse - A Cosmic Journey

Welcome to The Infinite Expanse

This experience uses audio for ambiance. Click below to begin your journey through the cosmos.

Interactive cosmic zoom experience

The Infinite Expanse

You are adrift in the endless ocean of spacetime. A journey through scale and wonder awaits. Use your mouse wheel, arrow keys, or swipe gestures to begin the descent.

The Local Group

Galaxies are not solitary islands. They cluster together, bound by gravity. This is our cosmic neighborhood, home to Andromeda, Triangulum, and our own Milky Way.

Andromeda Galaxy

A majestic spiral, twice the size of the Milky Way, containing a trillion stars. It's on a collision course with us, but the cosmic dance won't begin for another 4.5 billion years.

Stellar Nursery

Within galaxies lie vast clouds of dust and gas, like the Orion Nebula. These are stellar nurseries, where intense gravity forges new stars and planetary systems from cosmic chaos.

A New System

A young, fiery star ignites, its gravitational pull shaping the protoplanetary disk around it. From this dust and debris, new worlds are born, each with its own story.

The Journey Continues

From the infinitely large to the infinitesimally small, the patterns repeat. The universe is a story of scale, and this is just one path. The exploration is endless. Press the Home key or the Restart button to begin again.

Scroll to explore
suggestedFeatures: STABILIZATION: Refactor the entire journey into a data-driven architecture. Move all level data (titles, text, image URLs) and Point of Interest (POI) data from hardcoded HTML into a single JavaScript array of objects. The script should then dynamically generate the necessary HTML sections, POIs, and navigation dots on page load. This dramatically improves maintainability, scalability, and makes adding/reordering zoom levels trivial.

STABILIZATION: Overhaul the core zoom animation and starfield for a more convincing, continuous effect. Replace the current top-to-bottom starfield motion with a radial 'warp speed' effect where stars emanate from the center of the screen. The speed of these stars should dynamically accelerate and decelerate in sync with the zoom transitions, creating a powerful illusion of moving through space rather than just scaling static layers.

NEW FEATURE: Introduce 'Cosmic Anomalies' for non-linear discovery. Implement a system where rare, subtly animated phenomena (e.g., a gravitational lens effect, a distant supernova flash, or a passing rogue planet) can randomly appear on a zoom level. Interacting with an anomaly could trigger a unique, short visual/audio sequence or reveal a hidden 'lore' entry, adding mystery, replayability, and a sense of a dynamic, living universe.

NEW FEATURE: Implement a 'Cosmic Database' overlay. Add a small, unobtrusive icon on each level that, when clicked, opens a full-screen overlay with rich, curated information about the celestial object being viewed (e.g., Andromeda Galaxy). This overlay would feature key statistics (distance, age, size), a gallery of high-resolution real-world images (from Hubble/JWST), and links to authoritative sources like NASA or ESA, adding significant educational value.

NEW FEATURE: Add an 'Ambient Control Panel' for user personalization. Create a minimal, hideable UI panel that allows the user to customize their experience. This would include options to switch between different procedural ambient audio tracks (e.g., 'Deep Space Drone', 'Pulsar Rhythm', 'Stellar Winds'), and select from a few curated color themes that alter the UI highlights and starfield tint, allowing users to tailor the 'vibe' to their preference.

<!DOCTYPE html>

    <title>The Infinite Expanse | An Interactive Cosmic Journey</title>
    <meta name="description" content="An interactive, animated journey through the cosmos with an infinite zoom effect, exploring galaxies, nebulae, and the birth of stars.">
    <meta name="theme-color" content="#01000a">

    <!-- SEO & Social Sharing -->
    <meta property="og:title" content="The Infinite Expanse | An Interactive Cosmic Journey">
    <meta property="og:description" content="Use your mouse, keyboard, or touch gestures to zoom through the universe, from the Local Group to a newborn star.">

    <link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 100 100'%3E%3Ctext y='0.9em' font-size='90'%3E🌌%3C/text%3E%3C/svg%3E">

    "replace_with": "<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>The Infinite Expanse - A Cosmic Journey</title>
    <meta name="description" content="An interactive, animated journey through the cosmos with an infinite zoom effect.">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Exo+2:wght@300;400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        :root {
            /* Colors */
            --color-background-start: #01000a;
            --color-background-end: #000005;
            --color-text: #e8e8f0;
            --color-text-muted: #a0a0b0;
            --color-highlight: #a899ff;
            --color-highlight-glow: #a899ff80;
            --color-focus: #58f4f4;
            --star-color: #FFFFFF;

            /* Typography */
            --font-main: 'Exo 2', sans-serif;

            /* Sizing & Layout */
            --border-radius: 12px;
            --max-content-width: 65ch;
            --zoom-factor: 50;

            /* Timings & Easing */
            --timing-zoom: 1.6s;
            --timing-ui: 0.4s;
            --timing-micro: 0.2s;
            --ease-out-expo: cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);
            --ease-in-out-quad: cubic-bezier(0.45, 0, 0.55, 1);

            /* Z-Indexes */
            --z-starfield: -10;
            --z-content: 1;
            --z-poi: 2;
            --z-anomaly: 3;
            --z-ui: 100;
            --z-panel: 150;
            --z-overlay: 200;
            --z-loading: 9999;
        }

        *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; font-smoothing: antialiased; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; }

        html { font-size: 16px; scroll-behavior: smooth; background-color: var(--color-background-end); }
        html.no-js #app-container { display: none; }

        body {
            background-image: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, var(--color-background-start), var(--color-background-end));
            color: var(--color-text);
            font-family: var(--font-main);
            font-weight: 300;
            line-height: 1.7;
            overflow: hidden;
            height: 100vh;
            width: 100vw;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            perspective: 1200px;
            transition: background-color var(--timing-ui) ease-in-out;
        }

        body.overlay-active #app-container { filter: blur(5px); transform: scale(0.98); transition: filter var(--timing-ui), transform var(--timing-ui); }
        #app-container { transition: filter var(--timing-ui), transform var(--timing-ui); }

        .sr-only:not(:focus):not(:active) { position: absolute; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding: 0; margin: -1px; overflow: hidden; clip: rect(0, 0, 0, 0); white-space: nowrap; border: 0; }
        
        :focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--color-focus); outline-offset: 3px; border-radius: 4px; transition: outline-offset var(--timing-micro) ease; }
        :focus:not(:focus-visible) { outline: none; }

        .skip-link {
            position: absolute;
            top: -100px;
            left: 1rem;
            background: var(--color-highlight);
            color: var(--color-background-end);
            padding: 0.5rem 1rem;
            z-index: var(--z-loading);
            transition: top 0.3s ease-in-out;
        }
        .skip-link:focus { top: 1rem; }

        /* --- Overlays & Core UI --- */
        #loading-overlay {
            position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: var(--z-loading);
            background: var(--color-background-end);
            display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; text-align: center;
            transition: opacity 0.5s ease, visibility 0s 0.5s;
        }
        #loading-overlay.hidden { opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; pointer-events: none; }
        .loader-content { max-width: 600px; padding: 2rem; opacity: 1; transition: opacity var(--timing-ui) ease; }
        #loading-overlay.hidden .loader-content { opacity: 0; }
        .loader-content h1 { color: var(--color-highlight); margin-bottom: 1rem; }
        .start-button {
            margin-top: 2rem; padding: 0.8rem 2rem; font-size: 1.2rem; font-family: var(--font-main);
            background: var(--color-highlight); color: var(--color-background-end); border: none;
            border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform var(--timing-micro) ease, box-shadow var(--timing-micro) ease;
        }
        .start-button:hover, .start-button:focus-visible { transform: scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 0 20px var(--color-highlight-glow); }
        .start-button:disabled { background: var(--color-text-muted); cursor: not-allowed; transform: none; box-shadow: none; }

        .progress-bar {
            width: 80%; max-width: 300px; height: 4px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); margin: 1.5rem auto 0;
            border-radius: 2px; overflow: hidden;
        }
        .progress-bar-inner { width: 0; height: 100%; background: var(--color-highlight); transition: width 0.5s ease; }

        #starfield { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; z-index: var(--z-starfield); isolation: isolate; }

        #universe { 
            width: 100%; 
            height: 100%; 
            position: relative; 
            transform-style: preserve-3d; 
            transition: transform var(--timing-zoom) var(--ease-in-out-quad); 
            will-change: transform; 
        }

        /* --- Zoom Level & Content --- */
        .zoom-level {
            position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; 
            display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; 
            transform-origin: center center; 
            transition: opacity calc(var(--timing-zoom) / 2) ease-in-out, transform var(--timing-zoom) var(--ease-in-out-quad); 
            will-change: transform, opacity; 
            z-index: var(--z-content);
        }
        .level-content {
            position: relative; z-index: var(--z-content);
            text-align: center; max-width: var(--max-content-width); padding: 2rem; 
            background: rgba(5, 0, 15, 0.65); border-radius: var(--border-radius); 
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px); 
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); 
            box-shadow: 0 8px 32px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.37); 
            opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); 
            transition: opacity 0.6s var(--ease-out-expo) 0.6s, transform 0.6s var(--ease-out-expo) 0.6s; 
            will-change: opacity, transform; 
        }
        .zoom-level.active .level-content { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
        .level-content h1, .level-content h2 { font-weight: 700; color: var(--color-highlight); margin-bottom: 1rem; text-shadow: 0 0 12px var(--color-highlight-glow); }
        .level-content h1 { font-size: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 3.5rem); }
        .level-content h2 { font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 4vw, 2.5rem); }
        .level-content p { font-size: clamp(1rem, 2.5vw, 1.2rem); font-weight: 400; max-width: 55ch; margin: 0 auto 1.5rem; }
        .level-content p strong { color: var(--color-highlight); font-weight: 700; }
        .visual {
            position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; 
            object-fit: cover; pointer-events: none; 
            opacity: 0.3; 
            transition: opacity var(--timing-zoom) ease-in-out; 
            will-change: opacity; 
            z-index: -1;
        }
        .zoom-level.active .visual { opacity: 0.6; }
        .zoom-level figure { width: 100%; height: 100%; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; }

        /* --- UI Controls --- */
        #ui-container {
            position: fixed; bottom: 2rem; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); 
            z-index: var(--z-ui); 
            display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 1.5rem; 
            color: var(--color-text-muted); 
            transition: opacity var(--timing-ui) ease-in-out, visibility var(--timing-ui); 
            will-change: opacity; 
        }
        #ui-container.hidden { opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; visibility: hidden; }
        .scroll-prompt-icon { width: 24px; height: 40px; border: 2px solid var(--color-text-muted); border-radius: 20px; position: relative; }
        .scroll-prompt-icon::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 8px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); width: 4px; height: 8px; background: var(--color-text-muted); border-radius: 2px; animation: scroll-indicator 2.2s infinite cubic-bezier(0.42, 0, 0.58, 1); }
        @keyframes scroll-indicator { 0% { transform: translate(-50%, 0); opacity: 0; } 50% { opacity: 1; } 100% { transform: translate(-50%, 16px); opacity: 0; } }
        #reset-button {
            background: none; border: 1px solid var(--color-text-muted); color: var(--color-text-muted); 
            padding: 0.6rem 1.2rem; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; 
            font-family: var(--font-main); font-weight: 400; 
            transition: all var(--timing-micro) ease, opacity var(--timing-ui) ease, visibility var(--timing-ui) ease; 
            opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; 
        }
        #reset-button.visible { opacity: 1; visibility: visible; }
        #reset-button:hover, #reset-button:focus-visible {
            background-color: var(--color-text); color: var(--color-background-end); 
            border-color: var(--color-text); transform: translateY(-2px); 
            box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); 
        }

        /* --- Navigator & POIs --- */
        #scale-navigator { position: fixed; right: 2rem; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); z-index: var(--z-ui); display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.25rem; }
        .nav-dot { display: block; width: 14px; height: 14px; padding: 0; background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; transition: all var(--timing-micro) ease; position: relative; }
        .nav-dot:hover, .nav-dot:focus-visible { background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); border-color: var(--color-highlight); transform: scale(1.2); }
        .nav-dot.active { background-color: var(--color-highlight); transform: scale(1.6); border-color: var(--color-highlight); animation: nav-dot-throb 2s infinite ease-in-out; }
        @keyframes nav-dot-throb { 50% { box-shadow: 0 0 12px var(--color-highlight-glow); } }
        .nav-dot .tooltip { visibility: hidden; opacity: 0; position: absolute; right: 180%; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); background: var(--color-background-start); color: var(--color-text); padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 6px; white-space: nowrap; transition: visibility 0s var(--timing-ui), opacity var(--timing-ui) ease; pointer-events: none; }
        .nav-dot:hover .tooltip, .nav-dot:focus-visible .tooltip { visibility: visible; opacity: 1; transition-delay: 0.1s; }
        .poi-container { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; pointer-events: none; z-index: var(--z-poi); }
        .poi {
            position: absolute; width: 24px; height: 24px; padding: 0; 
            border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color-highlight); border: none; 
            cursor: pointer; pointer-events: all; 
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%); 
            display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; 
            transition: transform var(--timing-micro) ease; 
        }
        .poi::before {
            content: ''; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: var(--color-highlight); 
            border-radius: 50%; animation: poi-pulse 2.5s infinite var(--ease-in-out-quad); 
        }
        .poi:hover, .poi:focus-visible { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.2); }
        @keyframes poi-pulse { 0% { transform: scale(0.8); opacity: 0.5; } 70% { transform: scale(2.5); opacity: 0; } 100% { transform: scale(0.8); opacity: 0; } }
        .poi .tooltip { visibility: hidden; opacity: 0; position: absolute; bottom: 160%; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); background: var(--color-background-start); color: var(--color-text); padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 6px; white-space: nowrap; transition: visibility 0s 0.3s, opacity 0.3s ease; pointer-events: none; }
        .poi:hover .tooltip, .poi:focus-visible .tooltip { visibility: visible; opacity: 1; transition-delay: 0.1s; }

        /* --- Modals & Overlays --- */
        .overlay {
            position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,5,0.7); z-index: var(--z-overlay);
            display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; 
            backdrop-filter: blur(8px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(8px); 
            opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; 
            transition: opacity var(--timing-ui) ease, backdrop-filter var(--timing-ui) ease; 
        }
        .overlay:not(.hidden) { opacity: 1; pointer-events: all; }
        .modal-content {
            background: var(--color-background-start); border: 1px solid var(--color-highlight); 
            padding: 2.5rem; border-radius: var(--border-radius); 
            max-width: 90vw; width: 650px; position: relative; 
            transform: scale(0.95) translateY(10px); 
            transition: transform var(--timing-ui) var(--ease-out-expo); 
            box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); 
        }
        .overlay:not(.hidden) .modal-content { transform: scale(1) translateY(0); }
        .modal-content h3 { color: var(--color-highlight); margin-bottom: 1rem; font-size: 1.8rem; }
        .modal-content p { font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--color-text-muted); }
        .modal-close {
            position: absolute; top: 1rem; right: 1rem; 
            background: none; border: none; color: var(--color-text-muted); 
            font-size: 2rem; cursor: pointer; 
            width: 44px; height: 44px; 
            display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; 
            line-height: 1; 
            transition: color var(--timing-micro) ease, transform var(--timing-micro) ease; 
            border-radius: 50%;
        }
        .modal-close:hover, .modal-close:focus-visible { color: var(--color-text); transform: rotate(90deg); }

        /* --- Cosmic Database --- */
        .database-button {
            position: absolute; top: 1.5rem; left: 1.5rem; z-index: var(--z-ui);
            background: none; border: none; padding: 0; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 50%;
        }
        .database-button svg {
            width: 32px; height: 32px; fill: var(--color-text-muted); 
            transition: fill var(--timing-micro), transform var(--timing-micro);
        }
        .database-button:hover svg, .database-button:focus-visible svg { fill: var(--color-highlight); transform: scale(1.1); }
        #database-overlay {
            z-index: calc(var(--z-overlay) + 1); /* Ensure it's on top of other modals */
            background: rgba(1,0,10,0.9); backdrop-filter: blur(15px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(15px); 
            padding: 4vw; 
        }
        .database-content {
            width: 100%; height: 100%; max-width: 1400px; max-height: 90vh; 
            display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; grid-template-rows: auto 1fr; gap: 2rem; 
            transform: scale(0.95); 
            transition: transform 0.5s var(--ease-out-expo); 
        }
        #database-overlay:not(.hidden) .database-content { transform: scale(1); }
        .database-header { grid-column: 1 / -1; }
        .database-header h2 { font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.5rem); color: var(--color-highlight); }
        .database-info { overflow-y: auto; padding-right: 1rem; } 
        .database-info p { margin-bottom: 1rem; } .database-info ul { list-style: none; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .database-info li { margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .database-info strong { color: var(--color-text); }
        .database-gallery { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(150px, 1fr)); gap: 1rem; overflow-y: auto; align-content: start; }
        .database-gallery img {
            width: 100%; height: auto; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 8px; 
            border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); cursor: pointer; 
            transition: transform var(--timing-micro), box-shadow var(--timing-micro); 
        }
        .database-gallery img:hover, .database-gallery img:focus-visible {
            transform: scale(1.05); 
            box-shadow: 0 0 15px var(--color-highlight-glow); 
            outline: 2px solid var(--color-highlight);
        }
        .database-close { position: absolute; top: 2rem; right: 2rem; }

        /* --- Control Panel --- */
        #control-panel {
            position: fixed; top: 2rem; left: 2rem; z-index: var(--z-panel);
            background: rgba(5, 0, 15, 0.65); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            border-radius: var(--border-radius); padding: 1rem; 
            display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; 
            transform: translateX(-120%); 
            transition: transform 0.5s var(--ease-out-expo); 
        }
        #control-panel.visible { transform: translateX(0); }
        .control-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; }
        .control-group label { font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--color-text-muted); }
        .control-group select {
            background: var(--color-background-end); color: var(--color-text); 
            border: 1px solid var(--color-text-muted); border-radius: 4px; 
            padding: 0.3rem; font-family: var(--font-main); 
        }
        #panel-toggle {
            position: absolute; left: 100%; top: 0; background: var(--color-highlight); 
            border: none; width: 30px; height: 40px; border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0; 
            cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; 
        }
        #panel-toggle svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; fill: var(--color-background-end); transition: transform 0.5s var(--ease-out-expo); }
        #control-panel.visible #panel-toggle svg { transform: rotate(180deg); }

        /* --- Cosmic Anomaly --- */
        .cosmic-anomaly {
            position: absolute; z-index: var(--z-anomaly); 
            width: 60px; height: 60px; border: none; background: transparent; 
            cursor: pointer; pointer-events: all; 
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%); border-radius: 50%;
        }
        .cosmic-anomaly::before, .cosmic-anomaly::after {
            content: ''; position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; 
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%); border-radius: 50%; 
        }
        .cosmic-anomaly::before { width: 100%; height: 100%; background: radial-gradient(circle, transparent 40%, var(--color-focus) 60%, transparent 70%); animation: anomaly-spin 8s linear infinite; }
        .cosmic-anomaly::after { width: 10px; height: 10px; background: var(--color-focus); box-shadow: 0 0 15px 5px var(--color-focus); animation: anomaly-pulse 2s infinite alternate; }
        @keyframes anomaly-spin { to { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(360deg); } }
        @keyframes anomaly-pulse { to { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.5); opacity: 0.7; } }
        /* --- Help Modal --- */
        #help-modal .modal-content { width: auto; max-width: 500px; }
        #help-modal kbd { 
            background-color: #333; 
            border-radius: 3px; 
            border: 1px solid #555;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 #000;
            color: #eee;
            display: inline-block;
            font-family: monospace;
            font-size: 0.9em;
            font-weight: 700;
            line-height: 1;
            padding: 3px 6px;
            white-space: nowrap;
            text-transform: capitalize;
        }
        .shortcuts-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: auto 1fr; gap: 0.5rem 1.5rem; align-items: center; margin-top: 1.5rem; }
        .shortcuts-grid dt { text-align: right; }
        .shortcuts-grid dd { text-align: left; color: var(--color-text); }

        /* --- Responsive & Accessibility --- */
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            #scale-navigator { right: 1rem; gap: 1rem; }
            .nav-dot { width: 12px; height: 12px; }
            .nav-dot .tooltip { display: none; }
            #ui-container { bottom: 1rem; flex-direction: row; gap: 1rem; }
            .level-content { padding: 1.5rem; }
            .level-content h1 { font-size: 1.8rem; }
            .level-content h2 { font-size: 1.4rem; }
            .level-content p { font-size: 0.95rem; }
            #control-panel { top: 1rem; left: 1rem; padding: 0.8rem; }
            .database-content { grid-template-columns: 1fr; grid-template-rows: auto auto 1fr; height: auto; max-height: 85vh; }
            .database-header h2 { font-size: 1.8rem; }
        }

        @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
            *, *::before, *::after { animation-duration: 1ms !important; animation-iteration-count: 1 !important; transition-duration: 1ms !important; scroll-behavior: auto !important; }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <a href="#universe" class="skip-link">Skip to main content</a>

    <div id="loading-overlay" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="loading-title">
        <div class="loader-content">
            <h1 id="loading-title">Welcome to The Infinite Expanse</h1>
            <p>This experience uses audio for ambiance. Click below to begin your journey through the cosmos.</p>
            <button class="start-button" disabled>Loading Assets...</button>
            <div class="progress-bar" aria-hidden="true"><div class="progress-bar-inner"></div></div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div id="app-container">

        <h1 id="main-title" class="sr-only">Interactive cosmic zoom experience</h1>
        <canvas id="starfield" aria-hidden="true"></canvas>

        <main id="universe" aria-labelledby="main-title"></main>

    <nav id="scale-navigator" aria-label="Cosmic Scale Navigator"></nav>

    <div id="ui-container">
        <div id="scroll-prompt">
            <p class="sr-only">Scroll to explore</p>
            <div class="scroll-prompt-icon" aria-hidden="true"></div>
        </div>
        <button id="reset-button">Restart Journey</button>
    </div>

    <div id="poi-modal" class="overlay hidden" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="modal-title" aria-describedby="modal-info">
        <div class="modal-content" role="document">
            <button class="modal-close" aria-label="Close modal">×</button>
            <h3 id="modal-title"></h3>
            <div id="modal-info"></div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div id="database-overlay" class="overlay hidden" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="db-title">
        <div class="database-content" role="document">
            <header class="database-header">
                <h2 id="db-title"></h2>
            </header>
            <div class="database-info" id="db-info" tabindex="0"></div>
            <div class="database-gallery" id="db-gallery" tabindex="0"></div>        <button class="modal-close database-close" aria-label="Close database">×</button>
    </div>
    <div id="help-modal" class="overlay hidden" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="help-title">
        <div class="modal-content" role="document">
            <button class="modal-close" aria-label="Close help">×</button>
            <h3 id="help-title">Controls & Shortcuts</h3>
            <dl class="shortcuts-grid">
                <dt><kbd>↓</kbd> / <kbd>Scroll Down</kbd></dt>
                <dd>Zoom In</dd>
                <dt><kbd>↑</kbd> / <kbd>Scroll Up</kbd></dt>
                <dd>Zoom Out</dd>
                <dt><kbd>Home</kbd></dt>
                <dd>Restart Journey</dd>
                <dt><kbd>End</kbd></dt>
                <dd>Go to Final Level</dd>
                <dt><kbd>Esc</kbd></dt>
                <dd>Close Modal/Overlay</dd>
                <dt><kbd>?</kbd></dt>
                <dd>Toggle this Help Guide</dd>
            </dl>
        </div>
    </div>
    </div>

    <aside id="control-panel" aria-labelledby="panel-title">
        <h3 id="panel-title" class="sr-only">Experience Controls</h3>
        <div class="control-group">
            <label for="theme-select">Color Theme</label>
            <select id="theme-select"></select>
        </div>
        <div class="control-group">
            <label for="audio-select">Ambient Audio</label>
            <select id="audio-select"></select>
        </div>
        <button id="panel-toggle" aria-label="Toggle control panel" aria-expanded="false">
            <svg aria-hidden="true" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M8.59 16.59L13.17 12 8.59 7.41 10 6l6 6-6 6-1.41-1.41z"/></svg>
        </button>
    </aside>

    <div id="live-region" class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></div>

    </div> <!-- End #app-container -->

    <div id="noscript-message">
        <h1>JavaScript Required</h1>
        <p>This interactive experience requires JavaScript to function. Please enable it in your browser settings.</p>
    </div>

    <style>
        #noscript-message { display: none; text-align: center; padding: 2rem; }
        .no-js #noscript-message { display: block; }
    </style>
    <script>
        const COSMIC_DATA = [
            { 
                id: 'intro',
                title: 'The Infinite Expanse',
                description: 'You are adrift in the endless ocean of spacetime. A journey through scale and wonder awaits. Use your <strong>mouse wheel, arrow keys,</strong> or <strong>swipe gestures</strong> to begin the descent. Press <kbd>?</kbd> for controls.',
            },
            {
                id: 'local-group',
                title: 'The Local Group',
                description: 'Galaxies are not solitary islands. They cluster together, bound by gravity. This is our cosmic neighborhood, home to Andromeda, Triangulum, and our own Milky Way.',
                image: { src: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1446776811953-b23d57bd21aa?q=80&w=2072&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.0.3', alt: 'A vast, starry view of deep space, showcasing the distant glow of multiple galaxies within the Local Group.' },
                pois: [
                    { top: '40%', left: '30%', title: 'Andromeda Galaxy', info: 'Our galactic neighbor, M31, is a spiral galaxy approximately 2.5 million light-years from Earth. It is the largest galaxy of the Local Group.' },
                    { top: '65%', left: '70%', title: 'Triangulum Galaxy', info: 'The third-largest member of the Local Group, M33 is a spiral galaxy about 3 million light-years from Earth, notable for its high rate of star formation.' }
                ],
                database: {
                    title: 'The Local Group',
                    info: '<p>The Local Group is the galaxy group that includes the Milky Way. It has a total diameter of 10 million light-years and contains over 80 galaxies, most of which are dwarf galaxies.</p><ul><li><strong>Diameter:</strong> ~10 million light-years</li><li><strong>Major Galaxies:</strong> Andromeda (M31), Milky Way, Triangulum (M33)</li><li><strong>Total Mass:</strong> ~2 trillion solar masses</li></ul><p>The two most massive members, the Andromeda Galaxy and the Milky Way, are spiral galaxies that are moving towards each other and are predicted to collide in about 4.5 billion years, forming a giant elliptical galaxy.</p>',
                    gallery: [
                        { src: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1504333638930-c8787321eee0?q=80&w=800&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.0.3', alt: 'A bright, detailed image of the Andromeda Galaxy (M31) with its glowing core and sprawling spiral arms.' },
                        { src: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1462331940025-496dfbfc7564?q=80&w=800&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.0.3', alt: 'The Triangulum Galaxy (M33) showcasing its distinct spiral structure and pinkish H II regions.' }
                    ]
                }
            },
            {
                id: 'andromeda',
                title: 'Andromeda Galaxy',
                description: 'A majestic spiral, twice the size of the Milky Way, containing a trillion stars. It\'s on a collision course with us, but the cosmic dance won\'t begin for another 4.5 billion years.',
                image: { src: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1614726365953-521e45006344?q=80&w=1974&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.0.3', alt: 'A detailed view of the Andromeda Galaxy, showing its bright central bulge and intricate spiral arms laced with dark dust lanes.' },
                pois: [
                    { top: '50%', left: '50%', title: 'Galactic Core', info: 'The central region of the galaxy, containing a supermassive black hole (Sagittarius A* counterpart) and a high concentration of old, yellow stars.' },
                    { top: '20%', left: '80%', title: 'Dust Lanes', info: 'Dark bands of interstellar dust that obscure starlight, these lanes are the raw material for future star formation.' }
                ],
                anomaly: { chance: 0.3, top: '70%', left: '15%', title: 'Gravitational Lensing', info: 'A distant quasar\'s light is being bent and magnified by the immense gravity of a foreground star cluster, creating multiple distorted images of the same object—an Einstein Cross.' }
            },
            {
                id: 'nursery',
                title: 'Stellar Nursery',
                description: 'Within galaxies lie vast clouds of dust and gas, like the Orion Nebula. These are stellar nurseries, where intense gravity forges new stars and planetary systems from cosmic chaos.',
                image: { src: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1614726353813-950173558154?q=80&w=1974&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.0.3', alt: 'The vibrant, glowing gas clouds of the Orion Nebula, with hues of pink, purple, and blue, indicating active star formation.' },
                pois: [
                    { top: '55%', left: '45%', title: 'Trapezium Cluster', info: 'A very young open cluster of stars at the heart of the nebula. The intense ultraviolet radiation from these stars is what makes the surrounding gas glow.' }
                ]
            },
            {
                id: 'system',
                title: 'A New System',
                description: 'A young, fiery star ignites, its gravitational pull shaping the protoplanetary disk around it. From this dust and debris, new worlds are born, each with its own story.',
                image: { src: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1594904523975-195523956b58?q=80&w=2070&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.0.3', alt: 'An artist\'s conception of a young, bright star at the center of a swirling protoplanetary disk of gas and dust.' },
                pois: [
                    { top: '50%', left: '50%', title: 'Central Protostar', info: 'A large mass that forms by contraction of the gas of a giant molecular cloud, on its way to becoming a main-sequence star.' },
                    { top: '70%', left: '25%', title: 'Protoplanetary Disk', info: 'A rotating circumstellar disc of dense gas and dust surrounding a young newly formed star, from which planets may eventually form.' }
                ]
            },
            {
                id: 'outro',
                title: 'The Journey Continues',
                description: 'From the infinitely large to the infinitesimally small, the patterns repeat. The universe is a story of scale, and this is just one path. The exploration is endless. Press the <strong>Home key</strong> or the <strong>Restart button</strong> to begin again.',
            }
        ];

        const THEMES = {
            'Cosmic Purple': { '--color-highlight': '#a899ff', '--color-highlight-glow': '#a899ff80', '--star-color': '#FFFFFF' },
            'Nebula Green': { '--color-highlight': '#99ffd0', '--color-highlight-glow': '#99ffd080', '--star-color': '#d4fff0' },
            'Solar Flare': { '--color-highlight': '#ffc999', '--color-highlight-glow': '#ffc99980', '--star-color': '#fff0d4' },
        };

        const AUDIO_TRACKS = {
            'Deep Space Drone': [{ type: 'sine', freq: 40, gain: 0.5 }, { type: 'sawtooth', freq: 60, gain: 0.2, filter: 400 }],
            'Pulsar Rhythm': [{ type: 'square', freq: 220, gain: 0.2 }, { type: 'sine', freq: 80, gain: 0.4 }],
            'Stellar Winds': [{ type: 'pink-noise', gain: 0.15 }, { type: 'triangle', freq: 120, gain: 0.3 }]
        };

        class FocusTrap {
            constructor(element) {
                this.element = element;
                this.focusableElements = Array.from(this.element.querySelectorAll('a[href], button, textarea, input, select, [tabindex]:not([tabindex="-1"])'));
                this.firstFocusable = this.focusableElements[0];
                this.lastFocusable = this.focusableElements[this.focusableElements.length - 1];
                this.handleKeydown = this.handleKeydown.bind(this);
            }

            activate() { document.addEventListener('keydown', this.handleKeydown); }
            deactivate() { document.removeEventListener('keydown', this.handleKeydown); }

            handleKeydown(e) {
                if (e.key !== 'Tab') return;
                if (e.shiftKey) {
                    if (document.activeElement === this.firstFocusable) {
                        this.lastFocusable.focus();
                        e.preventDefault();
                    }
                } else {
                    if (document.activeElement === this.lastFocusable) {
                        this.firstFocusable.focus();
                        e.preventDefault();
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        class CosmicJourney {
            constructor() {
                try {
                    this.cacheDOMElements();
                    this.initState();
                    this.initUI();
                    this.initStarfield();
                    this.bindEventListeners();
                    document.documentElement.classList.remove('no-js');
                } catch (error) {
                    console.error("Failed to initialize Cosmic Journey:", error);
                    document.body.innerHTML = '<p>An error occurred while loading the experience. Please try refreshing the page.</p>';
                }
            }

            cacheDOMElements() {
                this.dom = {
                    root: document.documentElement,
                    body: document.body,
                    appContainer: document.getElementById('app-container'),
                    loadingOverlay: document.getElementById('loading-overlay'),
                    startButton: document.querySelector('.start-button'),
                    progressBar: document.querySelector('.progress-bar-inner'),
                    universe: document.getElementById('universe'),
                    uiContainer: document.getElementById('ui-container'),
                    scrollPrompt: document.getElementById('scroll-prompt'),
                    resetButton: document.getElementById('reset-button'),
                    liveRegion: document.getElementById('live-region'),
                    scaleNavigator: document.getElementById('scale-navigator'),
                    poiModal: document.getElementById('poi-modal'),
                    modalTitle: document.getElementById('modal-title'),
                    modalInfo: document.getElementById('modal-info'),
                    modalClose: document.querySelector('#poi-modal .modal-close'),
                    starfieldCanvas: document.getElementById('starfield'),
                    databaseOverlay: document.getElementById('database-overlay'),
                    dbTitle: document.getElementById('db-title'),
                    dbInfo: document.getElementById('db-info'),
                    dbGallery: document.getElementById('db-gallery'),
                    dbClose: document.querySelector('#database-overlay .database-close'),
                    helpModal: document.getElementById('help-modal'),
                    helpModalClose: document.querySelector('#help-modal .modal-close'),
                    controlPanel: document.getElementById('control-panel'),
                    panelToggle: document.getElementById('panel-toggle'),
                    themeSelect: document.getElementById('theme-select'),
                    audioSelect: document.getElementById('audio-select'),
                };
                this.starfieldCtx = this.dom.starfieldCanvas.getContext('2d');
            }

            initState() {
                const styles = getComputedStyle(this.dom.root);
                this.constants = {
                    ZOOM_FACTOR: parseFloat(styles.getPropertyValue('--zoom-factor')) || 50,
                    TRANSITION_SPEED: parseFloat(styles.getPropertyValue('--timing-zoom')) * 1000 || 1600,
                    NUM_LEVELS: COSMIC_DATA.length,
                    STAR_COUNT: window.innerWidth > 768 ? 800 : 400,
                    IMAGE_ASSETS: COSMIC_DATA.filter(d => d.image).map(d => d.image.src)
                };
                this.state = {
                    currentLevel: 0,
                    isAnimating: false,
                    touchStartY: 0,
                    audioInitialized: false,
                    activeOverlay: null, // 'poi', 'database', 'help'
                    lastFocusedElement: null,
                    settings: this.loadSettings(),
                    focusTrap: null,
                };
                this.audio = { context: null, masterGain: null, sources: [] };
                this.stars = [];
            }

            async initUI() {
                await this.preloadAssets();

                const universeFrag = document.createDocumentFragment();
                const navigatorFrag = document.createDocumentFragment();

                COSMIC_DATA.forEach((level, index) => {
                    const scale = Math.pow(this.constants.ZOOM_FACTOR, -index);
                    const isFirst = index === 0;
                    const tag = isFirst ? 'h1' : 'h2';
                    const titleId = `level-${index}-title`;

                    const levelEl = document.createElement('section');
                    levelEl.id = `level-${index}`;
                    levelEl.className = 'zoom-level';
                    levelEl.dataset.level = index;
                    levelEl.style.transform = `scale(${scale})`;
                    levelEl.setAttribute('aria-labelledby', titleId);

                    let figureHTML = '';
                    if (level.image) {
                        figureHTML = `
                            <figure class="visual-container">
                                <img class="visual" src="${level.image.src}" alt="${level.image.alt}" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
                                <figcaption class="sr-only">${level.title}</figcaption>
                                <div class="poi-container"></div>
                            </figure>
                        `;
                    }

                    let dbButtonHTML = '';
                    if (level.database) {
                        dbButtonHTML = `
                            <button class="database-button" data-level="${index}" aria-label="Open Cosmic Database for ${level.title}">
                                <svg aria-hidden="true" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 2C6.48 2 2 6.48 2 12s4.48 10 10 10 10-4.48 10-10S17.52 2 12 2zm0 18c-4.41 0-8-3.59-8-8s3.59-8 8-8 8 3.59 8 8-3.59 8-8 8zm-1-13h2v2h-2zm0 4h2v6h-2z"/></svg>
                            </button>
                        `;
                    }

                    levelEl.innerHTML = `
                        ${figureHTML}
                        <div class="level-content">
                            ${dbButtonHTML}
                            <${tag} id="${titleId}">${level.title}</${tag}>
                            <div>${level.description}</div>
                        </div>
                    `;
                    universeFrag.appendChild(levelEl);

                    const navDot = document.createElement('button');
                    navDot.className = 'nav-dot';
                    navDot.dataset.level = index;
                    navDot.setAttribute('aria-label', `Jump to ${level.title}`);
                    navDot.innerHTML = `<span class="tooltip">${level.title}</span>`;
                    navigatorFrag.appendChild(navDot);
                });

                this.dom.universe.appendChild(universeFrag);
                this.dom.scaleNavigator.appendChild(navigatorFrag);
                this.dom.zoomLevels = Array.from(this.dom.universe.querySelectorAll('.zoom-level'));

                this.populateSelect(this.dom.themeSelect, Object.keys(THEMES), this.state.settings.theme);
                this.populateSelect(this.dom.audioSelect, Object.keys(AUDIO_TRACKS), this.state.settings.audio);
                this.applyTheme(this.state.settings.theme);

                this.dom.zoomLevels[0].classList.add('active');
                this.dom.scaleNavigator.querySelector('.nav-dot').classList.add('active');
                this.updateLiveRegion();
            }
            populateSelect(selectElement, options, selectedValue) {
                selectElement.innerHTML = options.map(name => `<option value="${name}" ${name === selectedValue ? 'selected' : ''}>${name}</option>`).join('');
            }

            async preloadAssets() {
                const promises = this.constants.IMAGE_ASSETS.map(src => {
                    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
                        const img = new Image();
                        img.src = src;
                        img.onload = resolve;
                        img.onerror = reject;
                    });
                });

                let loadedCount = 0;
                const totalCount = promises.length;
                for (const promise of promises) {
                    try {
                        await promise;
                        loadedCount++;
                        const progress = (loadedCount / totalCount) * 100;
                        this.dom.progressBar.style.width = `${progress}%`;
                    } catch (e) {
                        console.warn("Failed to load an image asset:", e);
                    }
                }

                this.dom.startButton.disabled = false;
                this.dom.startButton.textContent = 'Enter the Universe';
            }

            bindEventListeners() {
                this.dom.startButton.addEventListener('click', () => this.startExperience());
                window.addEventListener('wheel', this.debounce(this.handleWheel.bind(this), 50), { passive: false });
                window.addEventListener('keydown', this.handleKeyDown.bind(this));
                window.addEventListener('touchstart', e => { this.state.touchStartY = e.touches[0].clientY; }, { passive: true });
                window.addEventListener('touchmove', this.debounce(this.handleTouchMove.bind(this), 50), { passive: false });
                this.dom.resetButton.addEventListener('click', () => this.resetZoom());
                window.addEventListener('resize', this.debounce(() => this.resizeStarfield(), 250));

                // Overlays
                this.dom.poiModal.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === this.dom.poiModal) this.hidePoiModal(); });
                this.dom.modalClose.addEventListener('click', () => this.hidePoiModal());
                this.dom.databaseOverlay.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === this.dom.databaseOverlay) this.hideDatabase(); });
                this.dom.dbClose.addEventListener('click', () => this.hideDatabase());
                this.dom.helpModal.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === this.dom.helpModal) this.hideHelpModal(); });
                this.dom.helpModalClose.addEventListener('click', () => this.hideHelpModal());

                // UI Elements
                this.dom.scaleNavigator.addEventListener('click', e => {
                    const navDot = e.target.closest('.nav-dot');
                    if (navDot) this.changeLevel(parseInt(navDot.dataset.level));
                });
                this.dom.universe.addEventListener('click', e => {
                    const poi = e.target.closest('.poi');
                    const anomaly = e.target.closest('.cosmic-anomaly');
                    const dbButton = e.target.closest('.database-button');
                    if (poi) this.showPoiModal(poi.dataset.title, poi.dataset.info, poi);
                    if (anomaly) this.showPoiModal(anomaly.dataset.title, anomaly.dataset.info, anomaly);
                    if (dbButton) this.showDatabase(parseInt(dbButton.dataset.level), dbButton);
                });

                // Control Panel
                this.dom.panelToggle.addEventListener('click', () => this.togglePanel());
                this.dom.themeSelect.addEventListener('change', e => this.applyTheme(e.target.value));
                this.dom.audioSelect.addEventListener('change', e => this.setAudioTrack(e.target.value));
            }

            startExperience() {
                this.dom.loadingOverlay.classList.add('hidden');
                this.dom.universe.focus();
                this.initAudio();
                this.setAudioTrack(this.state.settings.audio);
                
                if (this.state.settings.firstVisit) {
                    this.togglePanel(true);
                    setTimeout(() => this.togglePanel(false), 4000);
                    this.state.settings.firstVisit = false;
                    this.saveSettings();
                }
            }

            // --- Core Logic ---
            changeLevel(newLevel) {
                if (this.state.isAnimating || newLevel < 0 || newLevel >= this.constants.NUM_LEVELS || newLevel === this.state.currentLevel) return;
                this.state.currentLevel = newLevel;
                this.updateUniverse();
            }

            updateUniverse() {
                this.state.isAnimating = true;

                this.dom.zoomLevels.forEach((level, index) => {
                    const isActive = index === this.state.currentLevel;
                    level.classList.toggle('active', isActive);
                    level.setAttribute('aria-hidden', !isActive);
                });

                const totalScale = Math.pow(this.constants.ZOOM_FACTOR, this.state.currentLevel);
                const universeZ = this.state.currentLevel * -1000;
                this.dom.universe.style.transform = `translateZ(${universeZ}px) scale(${totalScale})`;

                this.dom.zoomLevels.forEach((level, index) => {
                    const levelScale = Math.pow(this.constants.ZOOM_FACTOR, -index);
                    level.style.transform = `scale(${levelScale})`;
                    level.style.opacity = (index >= this.state.currentLevel) ? '1' : '0';
                });

                this.updateUIState();
                this.spawnFeaturesForLevel();

                setTimeout(() => { this.state.isAnimating = false; }, this.constants.TRANSITION_SPEED);
            }

            updateUIState() {
                this.dom.scrollPrompt.style.display = (this.state.currentLevel === 0) ? 'block' : 'none';
                this.dom.resetButton.classList.toggle('visible', this.state.currentLevel > 0);
                this.dom.uiContainer.classList.toggle('hidden', this.state.currentLevel === this.constants.NUM_LEVELS - 1);
                this.dom.scaleNavigator.querySelectorAll('.nav-dot').forEach((dot, index) => {
                    dot.classList.toggle('active', index === this.state.currentLevel);
                });
                this.updateLiveRegion();
            }

            spawnFeaturesForLevel() {
                const levelData = COSMIC_DATA[this.state.currentLevel];
                const levelElement = this.dom.zoomLevels[this.state.currentLevel];
                const poiContainer = levelElement.querySelector('.poi-container');
                if (poiContainer) {
                    const poiFrag = document.createDocumentFragment();
                    (levelData.pois || []).forEach(poi => {
                        const poiEl = document.createElement('button');
                        poiEl.className = 'poi';
                        poiEl.style.top = poi.top;
                        poiEl.style.left = poi.left;
                        poiEl.dataset.title = poi.title;
                        poiEl.dataset.info = poi.info;
                        poiEl.setAttribute('aria-label', `Point of Interest: ${poi.title}`);
                        poiEl.innerHTML = `<span class="tooltip">${poi.title}</span>`;
                        poiFrag.appendChild(poiEl);
                    });
                    poiContainer.innerHTML = ''; // Clear previous
                    poiContainer.appendChild(poiFrag);
                }

                // Clear old anomalies
                const oldAnomaly = this.dom.universe.querySelector('.cosmic-anomaly');
                if (oldAnomaly) oldAnomaly.remove();

                if (levelData.anomaly && Math.random() < levelData.anomaly.chance) {
                    const anomaly = levelData.anomaly;
                    const anomalyEl = document.createElement('button');
                    anomalyEl.className = 'cosmic-anomaly';
                    anomalyEl.style.top = anomaly.top;
                    anomalyEl.style.left = anomaly.left;
                    anomalyEl.dataset.title = anomaly.title;
                    anomalyEl.dataset.info = anomaly.info;
                    anomalyEl.setAttribute('aria-label', `Cosmic Anomaly: ${anomaly.title}`);
                    levelElement.appendChild(anomalyEl);
                }
            }
            }



            // --- Event Handlers ---
            handleWheel(event) {
                if (this.state.isAnimating || this.state.activeModal) return;
                event.preventDefault();
                if (event.deltaY > 0) this.zoomIn();
                else this.zoomOut();
            }

            handleKeyDown(event) {
                if (event.key === '?' && !this.state.activeOverlay) {
                    event.preventDefault();
                    this.showHelpModal();
                    return;
                }

                if (this.state.activeOverlay) {
                    if (event.key === 'Escape') {
                        event.preventDefault();
                        this.closeActiveOverlay();
                    }
                    return;
                }

                if (this.state.isAnimating) return;

                const keyMap = {
                    'ArrowDown': () => this.zoomIn(), 'PageDown': () => this.zoomIn(),
                    'ArrowUp': () => this.zoomOut(), 'PageUp': () => this.zoomOut(),
                    'Home': () => this.resetZoom(), 'End': () => this.changeLevel(this.constants.NUM_LEVELS - 1),
                };
                if (keyMap[event.key]) { event.preventDefault(); keyMap[event.key](); }
            }

            handleTouchMove(e) {
                if (this.state.isAnimating || this.state.activeOverlay) return;
                const touchEndY = e.touches[0].clientY;
                const deltaY = this.state.touchStartY - touchEndY;
                if (Math.abs(deltaY) > 50) {
                    if (deltaY > 0) this.zoomIn(); else this.zoomOut();
                    this.state.touchStartY = touchEndY; // Reset after a successful swipe
                }
            }

            zoomIn() { this.changeLevel(this.state.currentLevel + 1); }
            zoomOut() { this.changeLevel(this.state.currentLevel - 1); }
            resetZoom() { this.changeLevel(0); }

            // --- Overlay Logic ---
            openOverlay(overlayElement, type, triggerElement) {
                this.state.lastFocusedElement = triggerElement || document.activeElement;
                this.dom.body.classList.add('overlay-active');
                this.dom.appContainer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
                overlayElement.classList.remove('hidden');
                this.state.activeOverlay = type;
                this.state.focusTrap = new FocusTrap(overlayElement);
                this.state.focusTrap.activate();
                const firstFocusable = overlayElement.querySelector('button, [href], input, select, textarea, [tabindex]:not([tabindex="-1"])');
                if (firstFocusable) firstFocusable.focus();
            }

            closeOverlay(overlayElement) {
                if (!this.state.activeOverlay) return;
                this.dom.body.classList.remove('overlay-active');
                this.dom.appContainer.removeAttribute('aria-hidden');
                overlayElement.classList.add('hidden');
                this.state.activeOverlay = null;
                if (this.state.focusTrap) this.state.focusTrap.deactivate();
                this.state.focusTrap = null;
                if (this.state.lastFocusedElement) this.state.lastFocusedElement.focus();
            }

            closeActiveOverlay() {
                switch(this.state.activeOverlay) {
                    case 'poi': this.hidePoiModal(); break;
                    case 'database': this.hideDatabase(); break;
                    case 'help': this.hideHelpModal(); break;
                }
            }

            showPoiModal(title, info, triggerElement) {
                this.dom.modalTitle.textContent = title;
                this.dom.modalInfo.innerHTML = `<p>${info}</p>`;
                this.openOverlay(this.dom.poiModal, 'poi', triggerElement);
            }

            hidePoiModal() {
                this.closeOverlay(this.dom.poiModal);
            }

            showDatabase(levelIndex, triggerElement) {
                const data = COSMIC_DATA[levelIndex].database;
                if (!data) return;
                this.dom.dbTitle.textContent = data.title;
                this.dom.dbInfo.innerHTML = data.info;
                this.dom.dbGallery.innerHTML = data.gallery.map(img => `<img src="${img.src}" alt="${img.alt}" loading="lazy" tabindex="0">`).join('');
                this.openOverlay(this.dom.databaseOverlay, 'database', triggerElement);
            }

            hideDatabase() {
                this.closeOverlay(this.dom.databaseOverlay);
            }

            showHelpModal(triggerElement) {
                this.openOverlay(this.dom.helpModal, 'help', triggerElement);
            }

            hideHelpModal() {
                this.closeOverlay(this.dom.helpModal);
            }

            // --- Customization & Settings ---
            togglePanel(forceOpen = null) {
                const isVisible = this.dom.controlPanel.classList.toggle('visible', forceOpen);
                this.dom.panelToggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', isVisible);
            }

            applyTheme(themeName) {
                const theme = THEMES[themeName];
                for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(theme)) {
                    this.dom.root.style.setProperty(key, value);
                }
                this.state.settings.theme = themeName;
                this.saveSettings();
            }

            saveSettings() {
                try {
                    localStorage.setItem('cosmicJourneySettings', JSON.stringify(this.state.settings));
                } catch (e) {
                    console.warn('Could not save settings to localStorage.');
                }
            }

            loadSettings() {
                const defaults = { theme: 'Cosmic Purple', audio: 'Deep Space Drone', firstVisit: true };
                try {
                    const saved = localStorage.getItem('cosmicJourneySettings');
                    return saved ? { ...defaults, ...JSON.parse(saved), firstVisit: false } : defaults;
                } catch (e) {
                    console.warn('Could not load settings from localStorage.');
                    return defaults;
                }
            }

            // --- Audio Engine ---
            initAudio() {
                if (this.state.audioInitialized) return;
                this.audio.context = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
                if (this.audio.context.state === 'suspended') this.audio.context.resume();
                this.audio.masterGain = this.audio.context.createGain();
                this.audio.masterGain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.3, this.audio.context.currentTime);
                this.audio.masterGain.connect(this.audio.context.destination);
                this.state.audioInitialized = true;
            }

            setAudioTrack(trackName) {
                if (!this.state.audioInitialized) return;
                
                this.audio.sources.forEach(s => {
                    s.gainNode.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0, this.audio.context.currentTime + 0.5);
                    if(s.node.stop) s.node.stop(this.audio.context.currentTime + 0.5);
                });
                this.audio.sources = [];

                const trackDefs = AUDIO_TRACKS[trackName];
                trackDefs.forEach(def => {
                    const source = {};
                    const gainNode = this.audio.context.createGain();
                    gainNode.gain.setValueAtTime(0, this.audio.context.currentTime);
                    gainNode.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(def.gain, this.audio.context.currentTime + 1.0);
                    gainNode.connect(this.audio.masterGain);
                    source.gainNode = gainNode;

                    if (def.type.includes('noise')) {
                        const bufferSize = 2 * this.audio.context.sampleRate;
                        const buffer = this.audio.context.createBuffer(1, bufferSize, this.audio.context.sampleRate);
                        const output = buffer.getChannelData(0);
                        let lastOut = 0;
                        for (let i = 0; i < bufferSize; i++) { const white = Math.random() * 2 - 1; output[i] = (lastOut + (0.02 * white)) / 1.02; lastOut = output[i]; output[i] *= 3.5; }
                        const noise = this.audio.context.createBufferSource();
                        noise.buffer = buffer; noise.loop = true; noise.start(0);
                        source.node = noise;
                    } else {
                        const osc = this.audio.context.createOscillator();
                        osc.type = def.type; osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(def.freq, this.audio.context.currentTime); osc.start();
                        source.node = osc;
                    }

                    if (def.filter) {
                        const filter = this.audio.context.createBiquadFilter();
                        filter.type = 'lowpass'; filter.frequency.setValueAtTime(def.filter, this.audio.context.currentTime);
                        source.node.connect(filter); filter.connect(gainNode);
                    } else {
                        source.node.connect(gainNode);
                    }
                    this.audio.sources.push(source);
                });
                this.state.settings.audio = trackName;
                this.saveSettings();
            }

            // --- Starfield Canvas ---
            initStarfield() {
                this.resizeStarfield();
                this.createStars();
                this.animateStarfield();
            }

            resizeStarfield() {
                this.dom.starfieldCanvas.width = window.innerWidth;
                this.dom.starfieldCanvas.height = window.innerHeight;
                this.stars = [];
                this.createStars();
            }

            createStars() {
                for (let i = 0; i < this.constants.STAR_COUNT; i++) {
                    this.stars.push({
                        x: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2000,
                        y: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2000,
                        z: Math.random() * 2000,
                    });
                }
            }

            animateStarfield() {
                const centerX = this.dom.starfieldCanvas.width / 2;
                const centerY = this.dom.starfieldCanvas.height / 2;
                const baseSpeed = this.state.isAnimating ? 10 : 0.5;
                const speed = baseSpeed + (this.state.currentLevel * 0.5);

                this.starfieldCtx.fillStyle = 'rgba(1, 0, 10, 0.2)'; // Trail effect
                this.starfieldCtx.fillRect(0, 0, this.dom.starfieldCanvas.width, this.dom.starfieldCanvas.height);
                this.starfieldCtx.fillStyle = getComputedStyle(this.dom.root).getPropertyValue('--star-color');

                this.stars.forEach(star => {
                    star.z -= speed;
                    if (star.z <= 0) {
                        star.x = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2000;
                        star.y = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2000;
                        star.z = 2000;
                    }

                    const k = 256 / star.z;
                    const px = star.x * k + centerX;
                    const py = star.y * k + centerY;

                    if (px > 0 && px < this.dom.starfieldCanvas.width && py > 0 && py < this.dom.starfieldCanvas.height) {
                        const size = (1 - star.z / 2000) * 4;
                        this.starfieldCtx.beginPath();
                        this.starfieldCtx.arc(px, py, size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                        this.starfieldCtx.fill();
                    }
                });

                requestAnimationFrame(this.animateStarfield.bind(this));
            }

            // --- Utilities ---
            debounce(func, delay) {
                let timeout;
                return (...args) => {
                    clearTimeout(timeout);
                    timeout = setTimeout(() => func.apply(this, args), delay);
                };
            }

            updateLiveRegion() {
                const levelTitle = COSMIC_DATA[this.state.currentLevel].title;
                this.dom.liveRegion.textContent = `Now viewing: ${levelTitle}`;
            }
        }

        window.addEventListener('load', () => {
            new CosmicJourney();
        });
    </script>
</body>
</html>
suggestedFeatures: STABILIZATION: Refactor the monolithic `CosmicJourney` class into smaller, focused modules (e.g., `UIManager`, `AudioEngine`, `StarfieldRenderer`, `StateManager`). Modify the `spawnFeaturesForLevel` logic to create all POI/Anomaly DOM elements once at initialization and use CSS to toggle their visibility, preventing inefficient DOM manipulation on every level change.

STABILIZATION: Enhance the visual engine by pausing the starfield's `requestAnimationFrame` loop when any modal is active to conserve resources. Implement a full-featured lightbox for the Cosmic Database gallery, allowing users to click thumbnails to view a larger image with its description, completing the currently static gallery feature.

NEW FEATURE: Introduce a 'Cosmic Log' system. When a user clicks a Point of Interest (POI) or Cosmic Anomaly, save its details to `localStorage`. Add a new 'Logbook' icon and overlay that displays all discovered items, creating a persistent record of the user's journey and encouraging full exploration.

NEW FEATURE: Implement dynamic, event-driven audio scapes. Modify the audio engine to react to user actions and on-screen events. For example, subtly alter the pitch or complexity of the ambient sound based on the current zoom level, and trigger unique, positional sound effects when a rare 'Cosmic Anomaly' appears on screen.

NEW FEATURE: Add interactive 'Wormholes' as a fast-travel mechanic. On certain levels, introduce a rare, visually distinct element that, when clicked, triggers a unique, high-speed zoom animation to a non-adjacent level. This breaks the linear progression and adds an element of surprise and replayability.
