    "replace_with": "<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>The Infinite Expanse - A Cosmic Journey</title>
    <meta name="description" content="An interactive, animated journey through the cosmos with an infinite zoom effect.">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Exo+2:wght@300;400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        :root {
            /* Colors */
            --color-background-start: #01000a;
            --color-background-end: #000005;
            --color-text: #e8e8f0;
            --color-text-muted: #a0a0b0;
            --color-highlight: #a899ff;
            --color-highlight-glow: #a899ff80;
            --color-focus: #58f4f4;
            --star-color: #FFFFFF;

            /* Typography */
            --font-main: 'Exo 2', sans-serif;

            /* Sizing & Layout */
            --border-radius: 12px;
            --max-content-width: 65ch;
            --zoom-factor: 50;

            /* Timings & Easing */
            --timing-zoom: 1.6s;
            --timing-ui: 0.4s;
            --timing-micro: 0.2s;
            --ease-out-expo: cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);
            --ease-in-out-quad: cubic-bezier(0.45, 0, 0.55, 1);

            /* Z-Indexes */
            --z-starfield: -10;
            --z-content: 1;
            --z-poi: 2;
            --z-anomaly: 3;
            --z-ui: 100;
            --z-panel: 150;
            --z-overlay: 200;
            --z-loading: 9999;
        }

        *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; font-smoothing: antialiased; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; }

        html { font-size: 16px; scroll-behavior: smooth; background-color: var(--color-background-end); }
        html.no-js #app-container { display: none; }

        body {
            background-image: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, var(--color-background-start), var(--color-background-end));
            color: var(--color-text);
            font-family: var(--font-main);
            font-weight: 300;
            line-height: 1.7;
            overflow: hidden;
            height: 100vh;
            width: 100vw;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            perspective: 1200px;
            transition: background-color var(--timing-ui) ease-in-out;
        }

        body.overlay-active #app-container { filter: blur(5px); transform: scale(0.98); transition: filter var(--timing-ui), transform var(--timing-ui); }
        #app-container { transition: filter var(--timing-ui), transform var(--timing-ui); }

        .sr-only:not(:focus):not(:active) { position: absolute; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding: 0; margin: -1px; overflow: hidden; clip: rect(0, 0, 0, 0); white-space: nowrap; border: 0; }
        
        :focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--color-focus); outline-offset: 3px; border-radius: 4px; transition: outline-offset var(--timing-micro) ease; }
        :focus:not(:focus-visible) { outline: none; }

        .skip-link {
            position: absolute;
            top: -100px;
            left: 1rem;
            background: var(--color-highlight);
            color: var(--color-background-end);
            padding: 0.5rem 1rem;
            z-index: var(--z-loading);
            transition: top 0.3s ease-in-out;
        }
        .skip-link:focus { top: 1rem; }

        /* --- Overlays & Core UI --- */
        #loading-overlay {
            position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: var(--z-loading);
            background: var(--color-background-end);
            display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; text-align: center;
            transition: opacity 0.5s ease, visibility 0s 0.5s;
        }
        #loading-overlay.hidden { opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; pointer-events: none; }
        .loader-content { max-width: 600px; padding: 2rem; opacity: 1; transition: opacity var(--timing-ui) ease; }
        #loading-overlay.hidden .loader-content { opacity: 0; }
        .loader-content h1 { color: var(--color-highlight); margin-bottom: 1rem; }
        .start-button {
            margin-top: 2rem; padding: 0.8rem 2rem; font-size: 1.2rem; font-family: var(--font-main);
            background: var(--color-highlight); color: var(--color-background-end); border: none;
            border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform var(--timing-micro) ease, box-shadow var(--timing-micro) ease;
        }
        .start-button:hover, .start-button:focus-visible { transform: scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 0 20px var(--color-highlight-glow); }
        .start-button:disabled { background: var(--color-text-muted); cursor: not-allowed; transform: none; box-shadow: none; }

        .progress-bar {
            width: 80%; max-width: 300px; height: 4px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); margin: 1.5rem auto 0;
            border-radius: 2px; overflow: hidden;
        }
        .progress-bar-inner { width: 0; height: 100%; background: var(--color-highlight); transition: width 0.5s ease; }

        #starfield { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; z-index: var(--z-starfield); isolation: isolate; }

        #universe { 
            width: 100%; 
            height: 100%; 
            position: relative; 
            transform-style: preserve-3d; 
            transition: transform var(--timing-zoom) var(--ease-in-out-quad); 
            will-change: transform; 
        }

        /* --- Zoom Level & Content --- */
        .zoom-level {
            position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; 
            display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; 
            transform-origin: center center; 
            transition: opacity calc(var(--timing-zoom) / 2) ease-in-out, transform var(--timing-zoom) var(--ease-in-out-quad); 
            will-change: transform, opacity; 
            z-index: var(--z-content);
        }
        .level-content {
            position: relative; z-index: var(--z-content);
            text-align: center; max-width: var(--max-content-width); padding: 2rem; 
            background: rgba(5, 0, 15, 0.65); border-radius: var(--border-radius); 
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px); 
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); 
            box-shadow: 0 8px 32px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.37); 
            opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); 
            transition: opacity 0.6s var(--ease-out-expo) 0.6s, transform 0.6s var(--ease-out-expo) 0.6s; 
            will-change: opacity, transform; 
        }
        .zoom-level.active .level-content { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
        .level-content h1, .level-content h2 { font-weight: 700; color: var(--color-highlight); margin-bottom: 1rem; text-shadow: 0 0 12px var(--color-highlight-glow); }
        .level-content h1 { font-size: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 3.5rem); }
        .level-content h2 { font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 4vw, 2.5rem); }
        .level-content p { font-size: clamp(1rem, 2.5vw, 1.2rem); font-weight: 400; max-width: 55ch; margin: 0 auto 1.5rem; }
        .level-content p strong { color: var(--color-highlight); font-weight: 700; }
        .visual {
            position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; 
            object-fit: cover; pointer-events: none; 
            opacity: 0.3; 
            transition: opacity var(--timing-zoom) ease-in-out; 
            will-change: opacity; 
            z-index: -1;
        }
        .zoom-level.active .visual { opacity: 0.6; }
        .zoom-level figure { width: 100%; height: 100%; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; }

        /* --- UI Controls --- */
        #ui-container {
            position: fixed; bottom: 2rem; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); 
            z-index: var(--z-ui); 
            display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 1.5rem; 
            color: var(--color-text-muted); 
            transition: opacity var(--timing-ui) ease-in-out, visibility var(--timing-ui); 
            will-change: opacity; 
        }
        #ui-container.hidden { opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; visibility: hidden; }
        .scroll-prompt-icon { width: 24px; height: 40px; border: 2px solid var(--color-text-muted); border-radius: 20px; position: relative; }
        .scroll-prompt-icon::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 8px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); width: 4px; height: 8px; background: var(--color-text-muted); border-radius: 2px; animation: scroll-indicator 2.2s infinite cubic-bezier(0.42, 0, 0.58, 1); }
        @keyframes scroll-indicator { 0% { transform: translate(-50%, 0); opacity: 0; } 50% { opacity: 1; } 100% { transform: translate(-50%, 16px); opacity: 0; } }
        #reset-button {
            background: none; border: 1px solid var(--color-text-muted); color: var(--color-text-muted); 
            padding: 0.6rem 1.2rem; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; 
            font-family: var(--font-main); font-weight: 400; 
            transition: all var(--timing-micro) ease, opacity var(--timing-ui) ease, visibility var(--timing-ui) ease; 
            opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; 
        }
        #reset-button.visible { opacity: 1; visibility: visible; }
        #reset-button:hover, #reset-button:focus-visible {
            background-color: var(--color-text); color: var(--color-background-end); 
            border-color: var(--color-text); transform: translateY(-2px); 
            box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); 
        }

        /* --- Navigator & POIs --- */
        #scale-navigator { position: fixed; right: 2rem; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); z-index: var(--z-ui); display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.25rem; }
        .nav-dot { display: block; width: 14px; height: 14px; padding: 0; background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; transition: all var(--timing-micro) ease; position: relative; }
        .nav-dot:hover, .nav-dot:focus-visible { background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); border-color: var(--color-highlight); transform: scale(1.2); }
        .nav-dot.active { background-color: var(--color-highlight); transform: scale(1.6); border-color: var(--color-highlight); animation: nav-dot-throb 2s infinite ease-in-out; }
        @keyframes nav-dot-throb { 50% { box-shadow: 0 0 12px var(--color-highlight-glow); } }
        .nav-dot .tooltip { visibility: hidden; opacity: 0; position: absolute; right: 180%; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); background: var(--color-background-start); color: var(--color-text); padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 6px; white-space: nowrap; transition: visibility 0s var(--timing-ui), opacity var(--timing-ui) ease; pointer-events: none; }
        .nav-dot:hover .tooltip, .nav-dot:focus-visible .tooltip { visibility: visible; opacity: 1; transition-delay: 0.1s; }
        .poi-container { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; pointer-events: none; z-index: var(--z-poi); }
        .poi {
            position: absolute; width: 24px; height: 24px; padding: 0; 
            border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color-highlight); border: none; 
            cursor: pointer; pointer-events: all; 
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%); 
            display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; 
            transition: transform var(--timing-micro) ease; 
        }
        .poi::before {
            content: ''; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: var(--color-highlight); 
            border-radius: 50%; animation: poi-pulse 2.5s infinite var(--ease-in-out-quad); 
        }
        .poi:hover, .poi:focus-visible { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.2); }
        @keyframes poi-pulse { 0% { transform: scale(0.8); opacity: 0.5; } 70% { transform: scale(2.5); opacity: 0; } 100% { transform: scale(0.8); opacity: 0; } }
        .poi .tooltip { visibility: hidden; opacity: 0; position: absolute; bottom: 160%; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); background: var(--color-background-start); color: var(--color-text); padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 6px; white-space: nowrap; transition: visibility 0s 0.3s, opacity 0.3s ease; pointer-events: none; }
        .poi:hover .tooltip, .poi:focus-visible .tooltip { visibility: visible; opacity: 1; transition-delay: 0.1s; }

        /* --- Modals & Overlays --- */
        .overlay {
            position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,5,0.7); z-index: var(--z-overlay);
            display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; 
            backdrop-filter: blur(8px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(8px); 
            opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; 
            transition: opacity var(--timing-ui) ease, backdrop-filter var(--timing-ui) ease; 
        }
        .overlay:not(.hidden) { opacity: 1; pointer-events: all; }
        .modal-content {
            background: var(--color-background-start); border: 1px solid var(--color-highlight); 
            padding: 2.5rem; border-radius: var(--border-radius); 
            max-width: 90vw; width: 650px; position: relative; 
            transform: scale(0.95) translateY(10px); 
            transition: transform var(--timing-ui) var(--ease-out-expo); 
            box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); 
        }
        .overlay:not(.hidden) .modal-content { transform: scale(1) translateY(0); }
        .modal-content h3 { color: var(--color-highlight); margin-bottom: 1rem; font-size: 1.8rem; }
        .modal-content p { font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--color-text-muted); }
        .modal-close {
            position: absolute; top: 1rem; right: 1rem; 
            background: none; border: none; color: var(--color-text-muted); 
            font-size: 2rem; cursor: pointer; 
            width: 44px; height: 44px; 
            display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; 
            line-height: 1; 
            transition: color var(--timing-micro) ease, transform var(--timing-micro) ease; 
            border-radius: 50%;
        }
        .modal-close:hover, .modal-close:focus-visible { color: var(--color-text); transform: rotate(90deg); }

        /* --- Cosmic Database --- */
        .database-button {
            position: absolute; top: 1.5rem; left: 1.5rem; z-index: var(--z-ui);
            background: none; border: none; padding: 0; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 50%;
        }
        .database-button svg {
            width: 32px; height: 32px; fill: var(--color-text-muted); 
            transition: fill var(--timing-micro), transform var(--timing-micro);
        }
        .database-button:hover svg, .database-button:focus-visible svg { fill: var(--color-highlight); transform: scale(1.1); }
        #database-overlay {
            z-index: calc(var(--z-overlay) + 1); /* Ensure it's on top of other modals */
            background: rgba(1,0,10,0.9); backdrop-filter: blur(15px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(15px); 
            padding: 4vw; 
        }
        .database-content {
            width: 100%; height: 100%; max-width: 1400px; max-height: 90vh; 
            display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; grid-template-rows: auto 1fr; gap: 2rem; 
            transform: scale(0.95); 
            transition: transform 0.5s var(--ease-out-expo); 
        }
        #database-overlay:not(.hidden) .database-content { transform: scale(1); }
        .database-header { grid-column: 1 / -1; }
        .database-header h2 { font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.5rem); color: var(--color-highlight); }
        .database-info { overflow-y: auto; padding-right: 1rem; } 
        .database-info p { margin-bottom: 1rem; } .database-info ul { list-style: none; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .database-info li { margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .database-info strong { color: var(--color-text); }
        .database-gallery { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(150px, 1fr)); gap: 1rem; overflow-y: auto; align-content: start; }
        .database-gallery img {
            width: 100%; height: auto; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 8px; 
            border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); cursor: pointer; 
            transition: transform var(--timing-micro), box-shadow var(--timing-micro); 
        }
        .database-gallery img:hover, .database-gallery img:focus-visible {
            transform: scale(1.05); 
            box-shadow: 0 0 15px var(--color-highlight-glow); 
            outline: 2px solid var(--color-highlight);
        }
        .database-close { position: absolute; top: 2rem; right: 2rem; }

        /* --- Control Panel --- */
        #control-panel {
            position: fixed; top: 2rem; left: 2rem; z-index: var(--z-panel);
            background: rgba(5, 0, 15, 0.65); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
            border-radius: var(--border-radius); padding: 1rem; 
            display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; 
            transform: translateX(-120%); 
            transition: transform 0.5s var(--ease-out-expo); 
        }
        #control-panel.visible { transform: translateX(0); }
        .control-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; }
        .control-group label { font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--color-text-muted); }
        .control-group select {
            background: var(--color-background-end); color: var(--color-text); 
            border: 1px solid var(--color-text-muted); border-radius: 4px; 
            padding: 0.3rem; font-family: var(--font-main); 
        }
        #panel-toggle {
            position: absolute; left: 100%; top: 0; background: var(--color-highlight); 
            border: none; width: 30px; height: 40px; border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0; 
            cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; 
        }
        #panel-toggle svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; fill: var(--color-background-end); transition: transform 0.5s var(--ease-out-expo); }
        #control-panel.visible #panel-toggle svg { transform: rotate(180deg); }

        /* --- Cosmic Anomaly --- */
        .cosmic-anomaly {
            position: absolute; z-index: var(--z-anomaly); 
            width: 60px; height: 60px; border: none; background: transparent; 
            cursor: pointer; pointer-events: all; 
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%); border-radius: 50%;
        }
        .cosmic-anomaly::before, .cosmic-anomaly::after {
            content: ''; position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; 
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%); border-radius: 50%; 
        }
        .cosmic-anomaly::before { width: 100%; height: 100%; background: radial-gradient(circle, transparent 40%, var(--color-focus) 60%, transparent 70%); animation: anomaly-spin 8s linear infinite; }
        .cosmic-anomaly::after { width: 10px; height: 10px; background: var(--color-focus); box-shadow: 0 0 15px 5px var(--color-focus); animation: anomaly-pulse 2s infinite alternate; }
        @keyframes anomaly-spin { to { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(360deg); } }
        @keyframes anomaly-pulse { to { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.5); opacity: 0.7; } }
        /* --- Wormhole --- */
        .wormhole {
            position: absolute; z-index: var(--z-anomaly);
            width: 80px; height: 80px; border: none; background: transparent;
            cursor: pointer; pointer-events: all;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
        }
        .wormhole-visual {
            width: 100%; height: 100%; border-radius: 50%;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, #000 20%, #30f 35%, #f0f 50%, #0ff 70%, #000 80%);
            animation: wormhole-spin 4s linear infinite, wormhole-pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
            transform-origin: center;
        }
        @keyframes wormhole-spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }
        @keyframes wormhole-pulse { to { filter: brightness(1.5) saturate(2); } }
        #universe.wormhole-travel { transition: transform 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.6, -0.28, 0.735, 0.045), filter 0.8s ease-in-out; filter: blur(8px); }

        /* --- Gallery Lightbox --- */
        #gallery-lightbox { z-index: calc(var(--z-overlay) + 2); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); }
        .lightbox-content { text-align: center; max-width: 90vw; max-height: 90vh; }
        #lightbox-image { max-width: 100%; max-height: 80vh; object-fit: contain; border-radius: 8px; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
        #lightbox-caption { font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--color-text-muted); }
        #gallery-lightbox .modal-close { color: var(--color-text); }

        /* --- Logbook --- */
        #logbook-entries { max-height: 60vh; overflow-y: auto; margin-top: 1.5rem; }
        .log-entry { border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); padding: 1rem 0; }
        .log-entry:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
        .log-entry h4 { color: var(--color-highlight); margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
        .log-entry p { font-size: 1rem; color: var(--color-text-muted); }
        #logbook-entries:empty::after { content: 'No discoveries logged yet. Explore points of interest to add them here.'; color: var(--color-text-muted); font-style: italic; }

        /* --- Feature Visibility --- */
        .feature-container { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; pointer-events: none; visibility: hidden; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.5s ease; }
        .zoom-level.active .feature-container { pointer-events: all; visibility: visible; opacity: 1; }

        /* --- Help Modal --- */
        #help-modal .modal-content { width: auto; max-width: 500px; }
        #help-modal kbd { 
            background-color: #333; 
            border-radius: 3px; 
            border: 1px solid #555;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 0 #000;
            color: #eee;
            display: inline-block;
            font-family: monospace;
            font-size: 0.9em;
            font-weight: 700;
            line-height: 1;
            padding: 3px 6px;
            white-space: nowrap;
            text-transform: capitalize;
        }
        .shortcuts-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: auto 1fr; gap: 0.5rem 1.5rem; align-items: center; margin-top: 1.5rem; }
        .shortcuts-grid dt { text-align: right; }
        .shortcuts-grid dd { text-align: left; color: var(--color-text); }

        /* --- Responsive & Accessibility --- */
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            #scale-navigator { right: 1rem; gap: 1rem; }
            .nav-dot { width: 12px; height: 12px; }
            .nav-dot .tooltip { display: none; }
            #ui-container { bottom: 1rem; flex-direction: row; gap: 1rem; }
            .level-content { padding: 1.5rem; }
            .level-content h1 { font-size: 1.8rem; }
            .level-content h2 { font-size: 1.4rem; }
            .level-content p { font-size: 0.95rem; }
            #control-panel { top: 1rem; left: 1rem; padding: 0.8rem; }
            .database-content { grid-template-columns: 1fr; grid-template-rows: auto auto 1fr; height: auto; max-height: 85vh; }
            .database-header h2 { font-size: 1.8rem; }
        }

        @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
            *, *::before, *::after { animation-duration: 1ms !important; animation-iteration-count: 1 !important; transition-duration: 1ms !important; scroll-behavior: auto !important; }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <a href="#universe" class="skip-link">Skip to main content</a>

    <div id="loading-overlay" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="loading-title">
        <div class="loader-content">
            <h1 id="loading-title">Welcome to The Infinite Expanse</h1>
            <p>This experience uses audio for ambiance. Click below to begin your journey through the cosmos.</p>
            <button class="start-button" disabled>Loading Assets...</button>
            <div class="progress-bar" aria-hidden="true"><div class="progress-bar-inner"></div></div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div id="app-container">

        <h1 id="main-title" class="sr-only">Interactive cosmic zoom experience</h1>
        <canvas id="starfield" aria-hidden="true"></canvas>

        <main id="universe" aria-labelledby="main-title"></main>

    <nav id="scale-navigator" aria-label="Cosmic Scale Navigator"></nav>

    <div id="ui-container">
        <div id="scroll-prompt">
            <p class="sr-only">Scroll to explore</p>
            <div class="scroll-prompt-icon" aria-hidden="true"></div>
        </div>
        <button id="reset-button">Restart Journey</button>
    </div>

    <div id="poi-modal" class="overlay hidden" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="modal-title" aria-describedby="modal-info">
        <div class="modal-content" role="document">
            <button class="modal-close" aria-label="Close modal">×</button>
            <h3 id="modal-title"></h3>
            <div id="modal-info"></div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div id="database-overlay" class="overlay hidden" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="db-title">
        <div class="database-content" role="document">
            <header class="database-header">
                <h2 id="db-title"></h2>
            </header>
            <div class="database-info" id="db-info" tabindex="0"></div>
            <div class="database-gallery" id="db-gallery" tabindex="0"></div>        <button class="modal-close database-close" aria-label="Close database">×</button>
    </div>
    <div id="help-modal" class="overlay hidden" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="help-title">
    <button id="logbook-button" class="database-button" aria-label="Open Cosmic Logbook" style="top: 5.5rem; left: 1.5rem;">
        <svg aria-hidden="true" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M19 3H5c-1.1 0-2 .9-2 2v14c0 1.1.9 2 2 2h14c1.1 0 2-.9 2-2V5c0-1.1-.9-2-2-2zm-5 14H7v-2h7v2zm3-4H7v-2h10v2zm0-4H7V7h10v2z"/></svg>
    </button>

    <div id="logbook-modal" class="overlay hidden" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="logbook-title">
        <div class="modal-content" role="document">
            <button class="modal-close" aria-label="Close logbook">×</button>
            <h3 id="logbook-title">Cosmic Logbook</h3>
            <div id="logbook-entries"></div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div id="gallery-lightbox" class="overlay hidden" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="lightbox-caption">
        <div class="lightbox-content">
            <img id="lightbox-image" src="" alt="">
            <p id="lightbox-caption"></p>
        </div>
        <button class="modal-close" aria-label="Close image view">×</button>
    </div>

        <div class="modal-content" role="document">
            <button class="modal-close" aria-label="Close help">×</button>
            <h3 id="help-title">Controls & Shortcuts</h3>
            <dl class="shortcuts-grid">
                <dt><kbd>↓</kbd> / <kbd>Scroll Down</kbd></dt>
                <dd>Zoom In</dd>
                <dt><kbd>↑</kbd> / <kbd>Scroll Up</kbd></dt>
                <dd>Zoom Out</dd>
                <dt><kbd>Home</kbd></dt>
                <dd>Restart Journey</dd>
                <dt><kbd>End</kbd></dt>
                <dd>Go to Final Level</dd>
                <dt><kbd>Esc</kbd></dt>
                <dd>Close Modal/Overlay</dd>
                <dt><kbd>?</kbd></dt>
                <dd>Toggle this Help Guide</dd>
            </dl>
        </div>
    </div>
    </div>

    <aside id="control-panel" aria-labelledby="panel-title">
        <h3 id="panel-title" class="sr-only">Experience Controls</h3>
        <div class="control-group">
            <label for="theme-select">Color Theme</label>
            <select id="theme-select"></select>
        </div>
        <div class="control-group">
            <label for="audio-select">Ambient Audio</label>
            <select id="audio-select"></select>
        </div>
        <button id="panel-toggle" aria-label="Toggle control panel" aria-expanded="false">
            <svg aria-hidden="true" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M8.59 16.59L13.17 12 8.59 7.41 10 6l6 6-6 6-1.41-1.41z"/></svg>
        </button>
    </aside>

    <div id="live-region" class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></div>

    </div> <!-- End #app-container -->

    <div id="noscript-message">
        <h1>JavaScript Required</h1>
        <p>This interactive experience requires JavaScript to function. Please enable it in your browser settings.</p>
    </div>

    <style>
        #noscript-message { display: none; text-align: center; padding: 2rem; }
        .no-js #noscript-message { display: block; }
    </style>        <script>
        const COSMIC_DATA = [
            { 
                id: 'intro',
                title: 'The Infinite Expanse',
                description: 'You are adrift in the endless ocean of spacetime. A journey through scale and wonder awaits. Use your <strong>mouse wheel, arrow keys,</strong> or <strong>swipe gestures</strong> to begin the descent. Press <kbd>?</kbd> for controls.',
            },
            {
                id: 'local-group',
                title: 'The Local Group',
                description: 'Galaxies are not solitary islands. They cluster together, bound by gravity. This is our cosmic neighborhood, home to Andromeda, Triangulum, and our own Milky Way.',
                image: { src: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1446776811953-b23d57bd21aa?q=80&w=2072&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib-rb-4.0.3', alt: 'A vast, starry view of deep space, showcasing the distant glow of multiple galaxies within the Local Group.' },
                pois: [
                    { top: '40%', left: '30%', title: 'Andromeda Galaxy', info: 'Our galactic neighbor, M31, is a spiral galaxy approximately 2.5 million light-years from Earth. It is the largest galaxy of the Local Group.' },
                    { top: '65%', left: '70%', title: 'Triangulum Galaxy', info: 'The third-largest member of the Local Group, M33 is a spiral galaxy about 3 million light-years from Earth, notable for its high rate of star formation.' }
                ],
                database: {
                    title: 'The Local Group',
                    info: '<p>The Local Group is the galaxy group that includes the Milky Way. It has a total diameter of 10 million light-years and contains over 80 galaxies, most of which are dwarf galaxies.</p><ul><li><strong>Diameter:</strong> ~10 million light-years</li><li><strong>Major Galaxies:</strong> Andromeda (M31), Milky Way, Triangulum (M33)</li><li><strong>Total Mass:</strong> ~2 trillion solar masses</li></ul><p>The two most massive members, the Andromeda Galaxy and the Milky Way, are spiral galaxies that are moving towards each other and are predicted to collide in about 4.5 billion years, forming a giant elliptical galaxy.</p>',
