        const THEMES = {
            'Cosmic Purple': { '--color-highlight': '#a899ff', '--color-highlight-glow': '#a899ff80', '--star-color': '#FFFFFF' },
            'Nebula Green': { '--color-highlight': '#99ffd0', '--color-highlight-glow': '#99ffd080', '--star-color': '#d4fff0' },
            'Solar Flare': { '--color-highlight': '#ffc999', '--color-highlight-glow': '#ffc99980', '--star-color': '#fff0d4' },
        };

        const AUDIO_TRACKS = {
            'Deep Space Drone': [{ type: 'sine', freq: 40, gain: 0.5 }, { type: 'sawtooth', freq: 60, gain: 0.2, filter: 400 }],
            'Pulsar Rhythm': [{ type: 'square', freq: 220, gain: 0.2 }, { type: 'sine', freq: 80, gain: 0.4 }],
            'Stellar Winds': [{ type: 'pink-noise', gain: 0.15 }, { type: 'triangle', freq: 120, gain: 0.3 }]
        };

        class FocusTrap {
            constructor(element) {
                this.element = element;
                this.focusableElements = Array.from(this.element.querySelectorAll('a[href], button, textarea, input, select, [tabindex]:not([tabindex="-1"])'));
                this.firstFocusable = this.focusableElements[0];
                this.lastFocusable = this.focusableElements[this.focusableElements.length - 1];
                this.handleKeydown = this.handleKeydown.bind(this);
            }

            activate() { document.addEventListener('keydown', this.handleKeydown); }
            deactivate() { document.removeEventListener('keydown', this.handleKeydown); }

            handleKeydown(e) {
                if (e.key !== 'Tab') return;
                if (e.shiftKey) {
                    if (document.activeElement === this.firstFocusable) {
                        this.lastFocusable.focus();
                        e.preventDefault();
                    }
                } else {
                    if (document.activeElement === this.lastFocusable) {
                        this.firstFocusable.focus();
                        e.preventDefault();
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        class FocusTrap {
            constructor(element) {
                this.element = element;
                this.focusableElements = Array.from(this.element.querySelectorAll('a[href], button, textarea, input, select, [tabindex]:not([tabindex="-1"])'));
                this.firstFocusable = this.focusableElements[0];
                this.lastFocusable = this.focusableElements[this.focusableElements.length - 1];
                this.handleKeydown = this.handleKeydown.bind(this);
            }

            activate() { document.addEventListener('keydown', this.handleKeydown); }
            deactivate() { document.removeEventListener('keydown', this.handleKeydown); }

            handleKeydown(e) {
                if (e.key !== 'Tab') return;
                if (e.shiftKey) {
                    if (document.activeElement === this.firstFocusable) {
                        this.lastFocusable.focus();
                        e.preventDefault();
                    }
                } else {
                    if (document.activeElement === this.lastFocusable) {
                        this.firstFocusable.focus();
                        e.preventDefault();
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        class StateManager {
            constructor() {
                const styles = getComputedStyle(document.documentElement);
                this.constants = {
                    ZOOM_FACTOR: parseFloat(styles.getPropertyValue('--zoom-factor')) || 50,
                    TRANSITION_SPEED: parseFloat(styles.getPropertyValue('--timing-zoom')) * 1000 || 1600,
                    NUM_LEVELS: COSMIC_DATA.length,
                    STAR_COUNT: window.innerWidth > 768 ? 800 : 400,
                    IMAGE_ASSETS: COSMIC_DATA.filter(d => d.image).map(d => d.image.src)
                };
                this.state = {
                    currentLevel: 0,
                    isAnimating: false,
                    touchStartY: 0,
                    activeOverlay: null,
                    lastFocusedElement: null,
                    focusTrap: null,
                };
                this.settings = this.loadSettings();
            }

            saveSettings() {
                try {
                    localStorage.setItem('cosmicJourneySettings', JSON.stringify(this.settings));
                } catch (e) {
                    console.warn('Could not save settings to localStorage.');
                }
            }

            loadSettings() {
                const defaults = { theme: 'Cosmic Purple', audio: 'Deep Space Drone', firstVisit: true };
                try {
                    const saved = localStorage.getItem('cosmicJourneySettings');
                    return saved ? { ...defaults, ...JSON.parse(saved), firstVisit: false } : defaults;
                } catch (e) {
                    console.warn('Could not load settings from localStorage.');
                    return defaults;
                }
            }
        }

        class StarfieldRenderer {
            constructor(canvas, starCount) {
                this.canvas = canvas;
                this.ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
                this.starCount = starCount;
                this.stars = [];
                this.isPaused = false;
                this.animationFrameId = null;
                this.state = { isAnimating: false, currentLevel: 0 };
                this.init();
            }

            init() {
                this.resize();
                this.createStars();
                this.animate();
            }

            resize() {
                this.canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
                this.canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
                this.stars = [];
                this.createStars();
            }

            createStars() {
                for (let i = 0; i < this.starCount; i++) {
                    this.stars.push({
                        x: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2000,
                        y: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2000,
                        z: Math.random() * 2000,
                    });
                }
            }

            animate() {
                if (this.isPaused) {
                    this.animationFrameId = requestAnimationFrame(this.animate.bind(this));
                    return;
                }

                const centerX = this.canvas.width / 2;
                const centerY = this.canvas.height / 2;
                const baseSpeed = this.state.isAnimating ? 10 : 0.5;
                const speed = baseSpeed + (this.state.currentLevel * 0.5);

                this.ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(1, 0, 10, 0.2)';
                this.ctx.fillRect(0, 0, this.canvas.width, this.canvas.height);
                this.ctx.fillStyle = getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue('--star-color');

                this.stars.forEach(star => {
                    star.z -= speed;
                    if (star.z <= 0) {
                        star.x = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2000;
                        star.y = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2000;
                        star.z = 2000;
                    }

                    const k = 256 / star.z;
                    const px = star.x * k + centerX;
                    const py = star.y * k + centerY;

                    if (px > 0 && px < this.canvas.width && py > 0 && py < this.canvas.height) {
                        const size = (1 - star.z / 2000) * 4;
                        this.ctx.beginPath();
                        this.ctx.arc(px, py, size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                        this.ctx.fill();
                    }
                });

                this.animationFrameId = requestAnimationFrame(this.animate.bind(this));
            }

            pause() { this.isPaused = true; }
            resume() { this.isPaused = false; }
            updateState(newState) { this.state = { ...this.state, ...newState }; }
        }

        class AudioEngine {
            constructor() {
                this.context = null;
                this.masterGain = null;
                this.sources = [];
                this.isInitialized = false;
            }

            init() {
                if (this.isInitialized) return;
                try {
                    this.context = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
                    if (this.context.state === 'suspended') this.context.resume();
                    this.masterGain = this.context.createGain();
                    this.masterGain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.3, this.context.currentTime);
                    this.masterGain.connect(this.context.destination);
                    this.isInitialized = true;
                } catch (e) {
                    console.error("Web Audio API is not supported in this browser.");
                }
            }

            setTrack(trackName) {
                if (!this.isInitialized) return;
                
                this.sources.forEach(s => {
                    s.gainNode.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0, this.context.currentTime + 0.5);
                    if(s.node.stop) s.node.stop(this.context.currentTime + 0.5);
                });
                this.sources = [];

                const trackDefs = AUDIO_TRACKS[trackName];
                if (!trackDefs) return;

                trackDefs.forEach(def => {
                    const source = {};
                    const gainNode = this.context.createGain();
                    gainNode.gain.setValueAtTime(0, this.context.currentTime);
                    gainNode.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(def.gain, this.context.currentTime + 1.0);
                    gainNode.connect(this.masterGain);
                    source.gainNode = gainNode;

                    if (def.type.includes('noise')) {
                        const bufferSize = 2 * this.context.sampleRate;
                        const buffer = this.context.createBuffer(1, bufferSize, this.context.sampleRate);
                        const output = buffer.getChannelData(0);
                        let lastOut = 0;
                        for (let i = 0; i < bufferSize; i++) { const white = Math.random() * 2 - 1; output[i] = (lastOut + (0.02 * white)) / 1.02; lastOut = output[i]; output[i] *= 3.5; }
                        const noise = this.context.createBufferSource();
                        noise.buffer = buffer; noise.loop = true; noise.start(0);
                        source.node = noise;
                    } else {
                        const osc = this.context.createOscillator();
                        osc.type = def.type; osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(def.freq, this.context.currentTime); osc.start();
                        source.node = osc;
                        source.oscillator = osc; // Keep a reference for modulation
                    }

                    if (def.filter) {
                        const filter = this.context.createBiquadFilter();
                        filter.type = 'lowpass'; filter.frequency.setValueAtTime(def.filter, this.context.currentTime);
                        source.node.connect(filter); filter.connect(gainNode);
                        source.filter = filter; // Keep a reference
                    } else {
                        source.node.connect(gainNode);
                    }
                    this.sources.push(source);
                });
            }

            updateSoundscape(level, numLevels) {
                if (!this.isInitialized || this.sources.length === 0) return;
                const progress = level / (numLevels - 1);
                this.sources.forEach(source => {
                    if (source.oscillator) {
                        const baseFreq = source.oscillator.frequency.value;
                        source.oscillator.frequency.linearRampToValueAtTime(baseFreq + (progress * 50), this.context.currentTime + 1.0);
                    }
                    if (source.filter) {
                        const baseFilterFreq = source.filter.frequency.value;
                        source.filter.frequency.linearRampToValueAtTime(baseFilterFreq + (progress * 400), this.context.currentTime + 1.0);
                    }
                });
            }

            playAnomalySound() {
                if (!this.isInitialized) return;
                const osc = this.context.createOscillator();
                const gain = this.context.createGain();
                osc.connect(gain);
                gain.connect(this.masterGain);
                osc.type = 'sine';
                osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(440, this.context.currentTime);
                osc.frequency.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(880, this.context.currentTime + 0.5);
                gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.4, this.context.currentTime);
                gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001, this.context.currentTime + 0.5);
                osc.start();
                osc.stop(this.context.currentTime + 0.5);
            }
        }

        class Logbook {
            constructor(uiManager) {
                this.uiManager = uiManager;
                this.discoveries = this.load();
                this.uiManager.dom.logbookButton.addEventListener('click', () => this.show());
                this.uiManager.dom.logbookModal.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === this.uiManager.dom.logbookModal) this.hide(); });
                this.uiManager.dom.logbookModal.querySelector('.modal-close').addEventListener('click', () => this.hide());
            }

            add(title, info) {
                if (!this.discoveries.some(d => d.title === title)) {
                    this.discoveries.push({ title, info });
                    this.save();
                }
            }

            save() {
                try {
                    localStorage.setItem('cosmicLog', JSON.stringify(this.discoveries));
                } catch (e) {
                    console.warn('Could not save logbook to localStorage.');
                }
            }

            load() {
                try {
                    const saved = localStorage.getItem('cosmicLog');
                    return saved ? JSON.parse(saved) : [];
                } catch (e) {
                    return [];
                }
            }

            render() {
                const container = this.uiManager.dom.logbookEntries;
                container.innerHTML = this.discoveries.map(d => `
                    <div class="log-entry">
                        <h4>${d.title}</h4>
                        <p>${d.info}</p>
                    </div>
                `).join('');
            }

            show() {
                this.render();
                this.uiManager.openOverlay(this.uiManager.dom.logbookModal, 'logbook', this.uiManager.dom.logbookButton);
            }

            hide() {
                this.uiManager.closeOverlay(this.uiManager.dom.logbookModal);
            }
        }

        class UIManager {
            constructor(app) {
                this.app = app;
                this.stateManager = app.stateManager;
                this.cacheDOMElements();
            }

            cacheDOMElements() {
                this.dom = {
                    root: document.documentElement,
                    body: document.body,
                    appContainer: document.getElementById('app-container'),
                    loadingOverlay: document.getElementById('loading-overlay'),
                    startButton: document.querySelector('.start-button'),
                    progressBar: document.querySelector('.progress-bar-inner'),
                    universe: document.getElementById('universe'),
                    uiContainer: document.getElementById('ui-container'),
                    scrollPrompt: document.getElementById('scroll-prompt'),
                    resetButton: document.getElementById('reset-button'),
                    liveRegion: document.getElementById('live-region'),
                    scaleNavigator: document.getElementById('scale-navigator'),
                    poiModal: document.getElementById('poi-modal'),
                    modalTitle: document.getElementById('modal-title'),
                    modalInfo: document.getElementById('modal-info'),
                    modalClose: document.querySelector('#poi-modal .modal-close'),
                    databaseOverlay: document.getElementById('database-overlay'),
                    dbTitle: document.getElementById('db-title'),
                    dbInfo: document.getElementById('db-info'),
                    dbGallery: document.getElementById('db-gallery'),
                    dbClose: document.querySelector('#database-overlay .database-close'),
                    helpModal: document.getElementById('help-modal'),
                    helpModalClose: document.querySelector('#help-modal .modal-close'),
                    controlPanel: document.getElementById('control-panel'),
                    panelToggle: document.getElementById('panel-toggle'),
                    themeSelect: document.getElementById('theme-select'),
                    audioSelect: document.getElementById('audio-select'),
                    galleryLightbox: document.getElementById('gallery-lightbox'),
                    lightboxImage: document.getElementById('lightbox-image'),
                    lightboxCaption: document.getElementById('lightbox-caption'),
                    logbookButton: document.getElementById('logbook-button'),
                    logbookModal: document.getElementById('logbook-modal'),
                    logbookEntries: document.getElementById('logbook-entries'),
                };
            }

            async init() {
                await this.preloadAssets();
                this.buildUniverseDOM();
                this.populateSelect(this.dom.themeSelect, Object.keys(THEMES), this.stateManager.settings.theme);
                this.populateSelect(this.dom.audioSelect, Object.keys(AUDIO_TRACKS), this.stateManager.settings.audio);
                this.applyTheme(this.stateManager.settings.theme);
                this.updateUIState();
            }

            buildUniverseDOM() {
                const universeFrag = document.createDocumentFragment();
                const navigatorFrag = document.createDocumentFragment();

                COSMIC_DATA.forEach((level, index) => {
                    const scale = Math.pow(this.stateManager.constants.ZOOM_FACTOR, -index);
                    const isFirst = index === 0;
                    const tag = isFirst ? 'h1' : 'h2';
                    const titleId = `level-${index}-title`;

                    const levelEl = document.createElement('section');
                    levelEl.id = `level-${index}`;
                    levelEl.className = `zoom-level ${index === 0 ? 'active' : ''}`;
                    levelEl.dataset.level = index;
                    levelEl.style.transform = `scale(${scale})`;
                    levelEl.setAttribute('aria-labelledby', titleId);

                    let figureHTML = '';
                    if (level.image) {
                        figureHTML = `
                            <figure class="visual-container">
                                <img class="visual" src="${level.image.src}" alt="${level.image.alt}" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
                                <figcaption class="sr-only">${level.title}</figcaption>
                                <div class="feature-container"></div>
                            </figure>
                        `;
                    }

                    let dbButtonHTML = '';
                    if (level.database) {
                        dbButtonHTML = `
                            <button class="database-button" data-level="${index}" aria-label="Open Cosmic Database for ${level.title}">
                                <svg aria-hidden="true" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 2C6.48 2 2 6.48 2 12s4.48 10 10 10 10-4.48 10-10S17.52 2 12 2zm0 18c-4.41 0-8-3.59-8-8s3.59-8 8-8 8 3.59 8 8-3.59 8-8 8zm-1-13h2v2h-2zm0 4h2v6h-2z"/></svg>
                            </button>
                        `;
                    }

                    levelEl.innerHTML = `
                        ${figureHTML}
                        <div class="level-content">
                            ${dbButtonHTML}
                            <${tag} id="${titleId}">${level.title}</${tag}>
                            <div>${level.description}</div>
                        </div>
                    `;
                    universeFrag.appendChild(levelEl);

                    const navDot = document.createElement('button');
                    navDot.className = `nav-dot ${index === 0 ? 'active' : ''}`;
                    navDot.dataset.level = index;
                    navDot.setAttribute('aria-label', `Jump to ${level.title}`);
                    navDot.innerHTML = `<span class="tooltip">${level.title}</span>`;
                    navigatorFrag.appendChild(navDot);
                });

                this.dom.universe.appendChild(universeFrag);
                this.dom.scaleNavigator.appendChild(navigatorFrag);
                this.dom.zoomLevels = Array.from(this.dom.universe.querySelectorAll('.zoom-level'));
                this.spawnAllFeatures();
            }

            spawnAllFeatures() {
                this.dom.zoomLevels.forEach((levelEl, index) => {
                    const levelData = COSMIC_DATA[index];
                    const featureContainer = levelEl.querySelector('.feature-container');
                    if (!featureContainer) return;

                    const featureFrag = document.createDocumentFragment();

                    (levelData.pois || []).forEach(poi => {
                        const poiEl = document.createElement('button');
                        poiEl.className = 'poi';
                        poiEl.style.top = poi.top;
                        poiEl.style.left = poi.left;
                        poiEl.dataset.title = poi.title;
                        poiEl.dataset.info = poi.info;
                        poiEl.setAttribute('aria-label', `Point of Interest: ${poi.title}`);
                        poiEl.innerHTML = `<span class="tooltip">${poi.title}</span>`;
                        featureFrag.appendChild(poiEl);
                    });

                    if (levelData.anomaly && Math.random() < levelData.anomaly.chance) {
                        const anomaly = levelData.anomaly;
                        const anomalyEl = document.createElement('button');
                        anomalyEl.className = 'cosmic-anomaly';
                        anomalyEl.style.top = anomaly.top;
                        anomalyEl.style.left = anomaly.left;
                        anomalyEl.dataset.title = anomaly.title;
                        anomalyEl.dataset.info = anomaly.info;
                        anomalyEl.setAttribute('aria-label', `Cosmic Anomaly: ${anomaly.title}`);
                        featureFrag.appendChild(anomalyEl);
                        this.app.audioEngine.playAnomalySound();
                    }

                    if (levelData.wormhole) {
                        const wormhole = levelData.wormhole;
                        const wormholeEl = document.createElement('button');
                        wormholeEl.className = 'wormhole';
                        wormholeEl.style.top = wormhole.top;
                        wormholeEl.style.left = wormhole.left;
                        wormholeEl.dataset.targetLevel = wormhole.targetLevel;
                        wormholeEl.setAttribute('aria-label', wormhole.title);
                        wormholeEl.innerHTML = `<div class="wormhole-visual"></div><span class="tooltip">${wormhole.title}</span>`;
                        featureFrag.appendChild(wormholeEl);
                    }

                    featureContainer.appendChild(featureFrag);
                });
            }

            async preloadAssets() {
                const promises = this.stateManager.constants.IMAGE_ASSETS.map(src => new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
                    const img = new Image();
                    img.src = src;
                    img.onload = resolve;
                    img.onerror = reject;
                }));

                let loadedCount = 0;
                for (const promise of promises) {
                    try {
                        await promise;
                        loadedCount++;
                        this.dom.progressBar.style.width = `${(loadedCount / promises.length) * 100}%`;
                    } catch (e) {
                        console.warn("Failed to load an image asset:", e);
                    }
                }

                this.dom.startButton.disabled = false;
                this.dom.startButton.textContent = 'Enter the Universe';
            }

            updateUniverseTransform() {
                const { currentLevel } = this.stateManager.state;
                const { ZOOM_FACTOR } = this.stateManager.constants;
                const totalScale = Math.pow(ZOOM_FACTOR, currentLevel);
                const universeZ = currentLevel * -1000;
                this.dom.universe.style.transform = `translateZ(${universeZ}px) scale(${totalScale})`;

                this.dom.zoomLevels.forEach((level, index) => {
                    level.style.opacity = (index >= currentLevel) ? '1' : '0';
                });
            }

            updateUIState() {
                const { currentLevel } = this.stateManager.state;
                const { NUM_LEVELS } = this.stateManager.constants;

                this.dom.zoomLevels.forEach((level, index) => {
                    const isActive = index === currentLevel;
                    level.classList.toggle('active', isActive);
                    level.setAttribute('aria-hidden', !isActive);
                });

                this.dom.scrollPrompt.style.display = (currentLevel === 0) ? 'block' : 'none';
                this.dom.resetButton.classList.toggle('visible', currentLevel > 0);
                this.dom.uiContainer.classList.toggle('hidden', currentLevel === NUM_LEVELS - 1);
                this.dom.scaleNavigator.querySelectorAll('.nav-dot').forEach((dot, index) => {
                    dot.classList.toggle('active', index === currentLevel);
                });
                this.updateLiveRegion();
            }

            openOverlay(overlayElement, type, triggerElement) {
                this.stateManager.state.lastFocusedElement = triggerElement || document.activeElement;
                this.dom.body.classList.add('overlay-active');
                this.dom.appContainer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
                overlayElement.classList.remove('hidden');
                this.stateManager.state.activeOverlay = type;
                this.stateManager.state.focusTrap = new FocusTrap(overlayElement);
                this.stateManager.state.focusTrap.activate();
                const firstFocusable = overlayElement.querySelector('button, [href], input, select, textarea, [tabindex]:not([tabindex="-1"])');
                if (firstFocusable) firstFocusable.focus();
                this.app.starfield.pause();
            }

            closeOverlay(overlayElement) {
                if (!this.stateManager.state.activeOverlay) return;
                this.dom.body.classList.remove('overlay-active');
                this.dom.appContainer.removeAttribute('aria-hidden');
                overlayElement.classList.add('hidden');
                this.stateManager.state.activeOverlay = null;
                if (this.stateManager.state.focusTrap) this.stateManager.state.focusTrap.deactivate();
                this.stateManager.state.focusTrap = null;
                if (this.stateManager.state.lastFocusedElement) this.stateManager.state.lastFocusedElement.focus();
                this.app.starfield.resume();
            }

            showPoiModal(title, info, triggerElement) {
                this.dom.modalTitle.textContent = title;
                this.dom.modalInfo.innerHTML = `<p>${info}</p>`;
                this.openOverlay(this.dom.poiModal, 'poi', triggerElement);
                this.app.logbook.add(title, info);
            }

            showDatabase(levelIndex, triggerElement) {
                const data = COSMIC_DATA[levelIndex].database;
                if (!data) return;
                this.dom.dbTitle.textContent = data.title;
                this.dom.dbInfo.innerHTML = data.info;
                this.dom.dbGallery.innerHTML = data.gallery.map(img => `<img src="${img.src}" alt="${img.alt}" loading="lazy" tabindex="0">`).join('');
                this.openOverlay(this.dom.databaseOverlay, 'database', triggerElement);
            }

            showHelpModal(triggerElement) {
                this.openOverlay(this.dom.helpModal, 'help', triggerElement);
            }

            showLightbox(imgElement) {
                this.dom.lightboxImage.src = imgElement.src;
                this.dom.lightboxImage.alt = imgElement.alt;
                this.dom.lightboxCaption.textContent = imgElement.alt;
                this.openOverlay(this.dom.galleryLightbox, 'lightbox', imgElement);
            }

            applyTheme(themeName) {
                const theme = THEMES[themeName];
                for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(theme)) {
                    this.dom.root.style.setProperty(key, value);
                }
                this.stateManager.settings.theme = themeName;
                this.stateManager.saveSettings();
            }

            togglePanel(forceOpen = null) {
                const isVisible = this.dom.controlPanel.classList.toggle('visible', forceOpen);
                this.dom.panelToggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', isVisible);
            }

            populateSelect(select, options, selected) {
                select.innerHTML = options.map(o => `<option value="${o}" ${o === selected ? 'selected' : ''}>${o}</option>`).join('');
            }

            updateLiveRegion() {
                const levelTitle = COSMIC_DATA[this.stateManager.state.currentLevel].title;
                this.dom.liveRegion.textContent = `Now viewing: ${levelTitle}`;
            }
        }

        class AppController {
            constructor() {
                try {
                    document.documentElement.classList.remove('no-js');
                    this.stateManager = new StateManager();
                    this.starfield = new StarfieldRenderer(document.getElementById('starfield'), this.stateManager.constants.STAR_COUNT);
                    this.audioEngine = new AudioEngine();
                    this.uiManager = new UIManager(this);
                    this.logbook = new Logbook(this.uiManager);
                    this.uiManager.init().then(() => this.bindEventListeners());
                } catch (error) {
                    console.error("Failed to initialize Cosmic Journey:", error);
                    document.body.innerHTML = '<p>An error occurred while loading the experience. Please try refreshing the page.</p>';
                }
            }

            bindEventListeners() {
                const { dom } = this.uiManager;
                dom.startButton.addEventListener('click', () => this.startExperience());
                window.addEventListener('wheel', this.debounce(this.handleWheel.bind(this), 50), { passive: false });
                window.addEventListener('keydown', this.handleKeyDown.bind(this));
                window.addEventListener('touchstart', e => { this.stateManager.state.touchStartY = e.touches[0].clientY; }, { passive: true });
                window.addEventListener('touchmove', this.debounce(this.handleTouchMove.bind(this), 50), { passive: false });
                dom.resetButton.addEventListener('click', () => this.resetZoom());
                window.addEventListener('resize', this.debounce(() => this.starfield.resize(), 250));

                // Modals & Overlays
                dom.poiModal.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === dom.poiModal) this.uiManager.closeOverlay(dom.poiModal); });
                dom.modalClose.addEventListener('click', () => this.uiManager.closeOverlay(dom.poiModal));
                dom.databaseOverlay.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === dom.databaseOverlay) this.uiManager.closeOverlay(dom.databaseOverlay); });
                dom.dbClose.addEventListener('click', () => this.uiManager.closeOverlay(dom.databaseOverlay));
                dom.helpModal.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === dom.helpModal) this.uiManager.closeOverlay(dom.helpModal); });
                dom.helpModalClose.addEventListener('click', () => this.uiManager.closeOverlay(dom.helpModal));
                dom.galleryLightbox.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === dom.galleryLightbox || e.target.classList.contains('modal-close')) this.uiManager.closeOverlay(dom.galleryLightbox); });

                // UI Elements
                dom.scaleNavigator.addEventListener('click', e => {
                    const navDot = e.target.closest('.nav-dot');
                    if (navDot) this.changeLevel(parseInt(navDot.dataset.level));
                });
                dom.universe.addEventListener('click', e => {
                    const poi = e.target.closest('.poi');
                    const anomaly = e.target.closest('.cosmic-anomaly');
                    const dbButton = e.target.closest('.database-button');
                    const wormhole = e.target.closest('.wormhole');
                    if (poi) this.uiManager.showPoiModal(poi.dataset.title, poi.dataset.info, poi);
                    if (anomaly) this.uiManager.showPoiModal(anomaly.dataset.title, anomaly.dataset.info, anomaly);
                    if (dbButton) this.uiManager.showDatabase(parseInt(dbButton.dataset.level), dbButton);
                    if (wormhole) this.initiateWormholeTravel(parseInt(wormhole.dataset.targetLevel));
                });
                dom.dbGallery.addEventListener('click', e => {
                    if (e.target.tagName === 'IMG') this.uiManager.showLightbox(e.target);
                });

                // Control Panel
                dom.panelToggle.addEventListener('click', () => this.uiManager.togglePanel());
                dom.themeSelect.addEventListener('change', e => this.uiManager.applyTheme(e.target.value));
                dom.audioSelect.addEventListener('change', e => {
                    this.audioEngine.setTrack(e.target.value);
                    this.stateManager.settings.audio = e.target.value;
                    this.stateManager.saveSettings();
                });
            }

            startExperience() {
                this.uiManager.dom.loadingOverlay.classList.add('hidden');
                this.uiManager.dom.universe.focus();
                this.audioEngine.init();
                this.audioEngine.setTrack(this.stateManager.settings.audio);
                
                if (this.stateManager.settings.firstVisit) {
                    this.uiManager.togglePanel(true);
                    setTimeout(() => this.uiManager.togglePanel(false), 4000);
                    this.stateManager.settings.firstVisit = false;
                    this.stateManager.saveSettings();
                }
            }

            changeLevel(newLevel, isWormhole = false) {
                const { state, constants } = this.stateManager;
                if (state.isAnimating || newLevel < 0 || newLevel >= constants.NUM_LEVELS || newLevel === state.currentLevel) return;
                
                state.isAnimating = true;
                state.currentLevel = newLevel;
                this.starfield.updateState({ isAnimating: true, currentLevel: newLevel });

                if (!isWormhole) {
                    this.uiManager.updateUniverseTransform();
                }
                this.uiManager.updateUIState();
                this.audioEngine.updateSoundscape(newLevel, constants.NUM_LEVELS);

                setTimeout(() => {
                    state.isAnimating = false;
                    this.starfield.updateState({ isAnimating: false });
                    if (isWormhole) this.uiManager.dom.universe.classList.remove('wormhole-travel');
                }, isWormhole ? 800 : constants.TRANSITION_SPEED);
            }

            initiateWormholeTravel(targetLevel) {
                if (this.stateManager.state.isAnimating) return;
                this.uiManager.dom.universe.classList.add('wormhole-travel');
                setTimeout(() => {
                    this.changeLevel(targetLevel, true);
                }, 100);
            }

            handleWheel(event) {
                if (this.stateManager.state.isAnimating || this.stateManager.state.activeOverlay) return;
                event.preventDefault();
                if (event.deltaY > 0) this.zoomIn();
                else this.zoomOut();
            }

            handleKeyDown(event) {
                if (event.key === '?' && !this.stateManager.state.activeOverlay) {
                    event.preventDefault();
                    this.uiManager.showHelpModal();
                    return;
                }

                if (this.stateManager.state.activeOverlay) {
                    if (event.key === 'Escape') {
                        event.preventDefault();
                        const { activeOverlay } = this.stateManager.state;
                        const overlayMap = {
                            'poi': this.uiManager.dom.poiModal,
                            'database': this.uiManager.dom.databaseOverlay,
                            'help': this.uiManager.dom.helpModal,
                            'lightbox': this.uiManager.dom.galleryLightbox,
                            'logbook': this.uiManager.dom.logbookModal,
                        };
                        if (overlayMap[activeOverlay]) this.uiManager.closeOverlay(overlayMap[activeOverlay]);
                    }
                    return;
                }

                if (this.stateManager.state.isAnimating) return;

                const keyMap = {
                    'ArrowDown': () => this.zoomIn(), 'PageDown': () => this.zoomIn(),
                    'ArrowUp': () => this.zoomOut(), 'PageUp': () => this.zoomOut(),
                    'Home': () => this.resetZoom(), 'End': () => this.changeLevel(this.stateManager.constants.NUM_LEVELS - 1),
                };
                if (keyMap[event.key]) { event.preventDefault(); keyMap[event.key](); }
            }

            handleTouchMove(e) {
                const { state } = this.stateManager;
                if (state.isAnimating || state.activeOverlay) return;
                const touchEndY = e.touches[0].clientY;
                const deltaY = state.touchStartY - touchEndY;
                if (Math.abs(deltaY) > 50) {
                    if (deltaY > 0) this.zoomIn(); else this.zoomOut();
                    state.touchStartY = touchEndY;
                }
            }

            zoomIn() { this.changeLevel(this.stateManager.state.currentLevel + 1); }
            zoomOut() { this.changeLevel(this.stateManager.state.currentLevel - 1); }
            resetZoom() { this.changeLevel(0); }

            debounce(func, delay) {
                let timeout;
                return (...args) => {
                    clearTimeout(timeout);
                    timeout = setTimeout(() => func.apply(this, args), delay);
                };
            }
        }

        window.addEventListener('load', () => {
            new AppController();
        });
    </script>
            constructor() {
                try {
                    this.cacheDOMElements();
                    this.initState();
                    this.initUI();
                    this.initStarfield();
                    this.bindEventListeners();
                    document.documentElement.classList.remove('no-js');
                } catch (error) {
                    console.error("Failed to initialize Cosmic Journey:", error);
                    document.body.innerHTML = '<p>An error occurred while loading the experience. Please try refreshing the page.</p>';
                }
            }

            cacheDOMElements() {
                this.dom = {
                    root: document.documentElement,
                    body: document.body,
                    appContainer: document.getElementById('app-container'),
                    loadingOverlay: document.getElementById('loading-overlay'),
                    startButton: document.querySelector('.start-button'),
                    progressBar: document.querySelector('.progress-bar-inner'),
                    universe: document.getElementById('universe'),
                    uiContainer: document.getElementById('ui-container'),
                    scrollPrompt: document.getElementById('scroll-prompt'),
                    resetButton: document.getElementById('reset-button'),
                    liveRegion: document.getElementById('live-region'),
                    scaleNavigator: document.getElementById('scale-navigator'),
                    poiModal: document.getElementById('poi-modal'),
                    modalTitle: document.getElementById('modal-title'),
                    modalInfo: document.getElementById('modal-info'),
                    modalClose: document.querySelector('#poi-modal .modal-close'),
                    starfieldCanvas: document.getElementById('starfield'),
                    databaseOverlay: document.getElementById('database-overlay'),
                    dbTitle: document.getElementById('db-title'),
                    dbInfo: document.getElementById('db-info'),
                    dbGallery: document.getElementById('db-gallery'),
                    dbClose: document.querySelector('#database-overlay .database-close'),
                    helpModal: document.getElementById('help-modal'),
                    helpModalClose: document.querySelector('#help-modal .modal-close'),
                    controlPanel: document.getElementById('control-panel'),
                    panelToggle: document.getElementById('panel-toggle'),
                    themeSelect: document.getElementById('theme-select'),
                    audioSelect: document.getElementById('audio-select'),
                };
                this.starfieldCtx = this.dom.starfieldCanvas.getContext('2d');
            }

            initState() {
                const styles = getComputedStyle(this.dom.root);
                this.constants = {
                    ZOOM_FACTOR: parseFloat(styles.getPropertyValue('--zoom-factor')) || 50,
                    TRANSITION_SPEED: parseFloat(styles.getPropertyValue('--timing-zoom')) * 1000 || 1600,
                    NUM_LEVELS: COSMIC_DATA.length,
                    STAR_COUNT: window.innerWidth > 768 ? 800 : 400,
                    IMAGE_ASSETS: COSMIC_DATA.filter(d => d.image).map(d => d.image.src)
                };
                this.state = {
                    currentLevel: 0,
                    isAnimating: false,
                    touchStartY: 0,
                    audioInitialized: false,
                    activeOverlay: null, // 'poi', 'database', 'help'
                    lastFocusedElement: null,
                    settings: this.loadSettings(),
                    focusTrap: null,
                };
                this.audio = { context: null, masterGain: null, sources: [] };
                this.stars = [];
            }

            async initUI() {
                await this.preloadAssets();

                const universeFrag = document.createDocumentFragment();
                const navigatorFrag = document.createDocumentFragment();

                COSMIC_DATA.forEach((level, index) => {
                    const scale = Math.pow(this.constants.ZOOM_FACTOR, -index);
                    const isFirst = index === 0;
                    const tag = isFirst ? 'h1' : 'h2';
                    const titleId = `level-${index}-title`;

                    const levelEl = document.createElement('section');
                    levelEl.id = `level-${index}`;
                    levelEl.className = 'zoom-level';
                    levelEl.dataset.level = index;
                    levelEl.style.transform = `scale(${scale})`;
                    levelEl.setAttribute('aria-labelledby', titleId);

                    let figureHTML = '';
                    if (level.image) {
                        figureHTML = `
                            <figure class="visual-container">
                                <img class="visual" src="${level.image.src}" alt="${level.image.alt}" loading="lazy" decoding="async">
                                <figcaption class="sr-only">${level.title}</figcaption>
                                <div class="feature-container"></div>
                            </figure>
                        `;
                    }

                    let dbButtonHTML = '';
                    if (level.database) {
                        dbButtonHTML = `
                            <button class="database-button" data-level="${index}" aria-label="Open Cosmic Database for ${level.title}">
                                <svg aria-hidden="true" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 2C6.48 2 2 6.48 2 12s4.48 10 10 10 10-4.48 10-10S17.52 2 12 2zm0 18c-4.41 0-8-3.59-8-8s3.59-8 8-8 8 3.59 8 8-3.59 8-8 8zm-1-13h2v2h-2zm0 4h2v6h-2z"/></svg>
                            </button>
                        `;
                    }

                    levelEl.innerHTML = `
                        ${figureHTML}
                        <div class="level-content">
                            ${dbButtonHTML}
                            <${tag} id="${titleId}">${level.title}</${tag}>
                            <div>${level.description}</div>
                        </div>
                    `;
                    universeFrag.appendChild(levelEl);

                    const navDot = document.createElement('button');
                    navDot.className = 'nav-dot';
                    navDot.dataset.level = index;
                    navDot.setAttribute('aria-label', `Jump to ${level.title}`);
                    navDot.innerHTML = `<span class="tooltip">${level.title}</span>`;
                    navigatorFrag.appendChild(navDot);
                });

                this.dom.universe.appendChild(universeFrag);
                this.dom.scaleNavigator.appendChild(navigatorFrag);
                this.dom.zoomLevels = Array.from(this.dom.universe.querySelectorAll('.zoom-level'));

                this.populateSelect(this.dom.themeSelect, Object.keys(THEMES), this.state.settings.theme);
                this.populateSelect(this.dom.audioSelect, Object.keys(AUDIO_TRACKS), this.state.settings.audio);
                this.applyTheme(this.state.settings.theme);

                this.dom.zoomLevels[0].classList.add('active');
                this.dom.scaleNavigator.querySelector('.nav-dot').classList.add('active');
                this.updateLiveRegion();
            }
            populateSelect(selectElement, options, selectedValue) {
                selectElement.innerHTML = options.map(name => `<option value="${name}" ${name === selectedValue ? 'selected' : ''}>${name}</option>`).join('');
            }

            async preloadAssets() {
                const promises = this.constants.IMAGE_ASSETS.map(src => {
                    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
                        const img = new Image();
                        img.src = src;
                        img.onload = resolve;
                        img.onerror = reject;
                    });
                });

                let loadedCount = 0;
                const totalCount = promises.length;
                for (const promise of promises) {
                    try {
                        await promise;
                        loadedCount++;
                        const progress = (loadedCount / totalCount) * 100;
                        this.dom.progressBar.style.width = `${progress}%`;
                    } catch (e) {
                        console.warn("Failed to load an image asset:", e);
                    }
                }

                this.dom.startButton.disabled = false;
                this.dom.startButton.textContent = 'Enter the Universe';
            }

            bindEventListeners() {
                this.dom.startButton.addEventListener('click', () => this.startExperience());
                window.addEventListener('wheel', this.debounce(this.handleWheel.bind(this), 50), { passive: false });
                window.addEventListener('keydown', this.handleKeyDown.bind(this));
                window.addEventListener('touchstart', e => { this.state.touchStartY = e.touches[0].clientY; }, { passive: true });
                window.addEventListener('touchmove', this.debounce(this.handleTouchMove.bind(this), 50), { passive: false });
                this.dom.resetButton.addEventListener('click', () => this.resetZoom());
                window.addEventListener('resize', this.debounce(() => this.resizeStarfield(), 250));

                // Overlays
                this.dom.poiModal.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === this.dom.poiModal) this.hidePoiModal(); });
                this.dom.modalClose.addEventListener('click', () => this.hidePoiModal());
                this.dom.databaseOverlay.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === this.dom.databaseOverlay) this.hideDatabase(); });
                this.dom.dbClose.addEventListener('click', () => this.hideDatabase());
                this.dom.helpModal.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === this.dom.helpModal) this.hideHelpModal(); });
                this.dom.helpModalClose.addEventListener('click', () => this.hideHelpModal());

                // UI Elements
                this.dom.scaleNavigator.addEventListener('click', e => {
                    const navDot = e.target.closest('.nav-dot');
                    if (navDot) this.changeLevel(parseInt(navDot.dataset.level));
                });
                this.dom.universe.addEventListener('click', e => {
                    const poi = e.target.closest('.poi');
                    const anomaly = e.target.closest('.cosmic-anomaly');
                    const dbButton = e.target.closest('.database-button');
                    if (poi) this.showPoiModal(poi.dataset.title, poi.dataset.info, poi);
                    if (anomaly) this.showPoiModal(anomaly.dataset.title, anomaly.dataset.info, anomaly);
                    if (dbButton) this.showDatabase(parseInt(dbButton.dataset.level), dbButton);
                });

                // Control Panel
                this.dom.panelToggle.addEventListener('click', () => this.togglePanel());
                this.dom.themeSelect.addEventListener('change', e => this.applyTheme(e.target.value));
                this.dom.audioSelect.addEventListener('change', e => this.setAudioTrack(e.target.value));
            }

            startExperience() {
                this.dom.loadingOverlay.classList.add('hidden');
                this.dom.universe.focus();
                this.initAudio();
                this.setAudioTrack(this.state.settings.audio);
                
                if (this.state.settings.firstVisit) {
                    this.togglePanel(true);
                    setTimeout(() => this.togglePanel(false), 4000);
                    this.state.settings.firstVisit = false;
                    this.saveSettings();
                }
            }

            // --- Core Logic ---
            changeLevel(newLevel) {
                if (this.state.isAnimating || newLevel < 0 || newLevel >= this.constants.NUM_LEVELS || newLevel === this.state.currentLevel) return;
                this.state.currentLevel = newLevel;
                this.updateUniverse();
            }

            updateUniverse() {
                this.state.isAnimating = true;

                this.dom.zoomLevels.forEach((level, index) => {
                    const isActive = index === this.state.currentLevel;
                    level.classList.toggle('active', isActive);
                    level.setAttribute('aria-hidden', !isActive);
                });

                const totalScale = Math.pow(this.constants.ZOOM_FACTOR, this.state.currentLevel);
                const universeZ = this.state.currentLevel * -1000;
                this.dom.universe.style.transform = `translateZ(${universeZ}px) scale(${totalScale})`;

                this.dom.zoomLevels.forEach((level, index) => {
                    const levelScale = Math.pow(this.constants.ZOOM_FACTOR, -index);
                    level.style.transform = `scale(${levelScale})`;
                    level.style.opacity = (index >= this.state.currentLevel) ? '1' : '0';
                });

                this.updateUIState();
                this.spawnFeaturesForLevel();

                setTimeout(() => { this.state.isAnimating = false; }, this.constants.TRANSITION_SPEED);
            }

            updateUIState() {
                this.dom.scrollPrompt.style.display = (this.state.currentLevel === 0) ? 'block' : 'none';
                this.dom.resetButton.classList.toggle('visible', this.state.currentLevel > 0);
                this.dom.uiContainer.classList.toggle('hidden', this.state.currentLevel === this.constants.NUM_LEVELS - 1);
                this.dom.scaleNavigator.querySelectorAll('.nav-dot').forEach((dot, index) => {
                    dot.classList.toggle('active', index === this.state.currentLevel);
                });
                this.updateLiveRegion();
            }

            spawnFeaturesForLevel() {
                const levelData = COSMIC_DATA[this.state.currentLevel];
                const levelElement = this.dom.zoomLevels[this.state.currentLevel];
                const poiContainer = levelElement.querySelector('.poi-container');
                if (poiContainer) {
                    const poiFrag = document.createDocumentFragment();
                    (levelData.pois || []).forEach(poi => {
                        const poiEl = document.createElement('button');
                        poiEl.className = 'poi';
                        poiEl.style.top = poi.top;
                        poiEl.style.left = poi.left;
                        poiEl.dataset.title = poi.title;
                        poiEl.dataset.info = poi.info;
                        poiEl.setAttribute('aria-label', `Point of Interest: ${poi.title}`);
                        poiEl.innerHTML = `<span class="tooltip">${poi.title}</span>`;
                        poiFrag.appendChild(poiEl);
                    });
                    poiContainer.innerHTML = ''; // Clear previous
                    poiContainer.appendChild(poiFrag);
                }

                // Clear old anomalies
                const oldAnomaly = this.dom.universe.querySelector('.cosmic-anomaly');
                if (oldAnomaly) oldAnomaly.remove();

                if (levelData.anomaly && Math.random() < levelData.anomaly.chance) {
                    const anomaly = levelData.anomaly;
                    const anomalyEl = document.createElement('button');
                    anomalyEl.className = 'cosmic-anomaly';
                    anomalyEl.style.top = anomaly.top;
                    anomalyEl.style.left = anomaly.left;
                    anomalyEl.dataset.title = anomaly.title;
                    anomalyEl.dataset.info = anomaly.info;
                    anomalyEl.setAttribute('aria-label', `Cosmic Anomaly: ${anomaly.title}`);
                    levelElement.appendChild(anomalyEl);
                }
            }
            }



            // --- Event Handlers ---
            handleWheel(event) {
                if (this.state.isAnimating || this.state.activeModal) return;
                event.preventDefault();
                if (event.deltaY > 0) this.zoomIn();
                else this.zoomOut();
            }

            handleKeyDown(event) {
                if (event.key === '?' && !this.state.activeOverlay) {
                    event.preventDefault();
                    this.showHelpModal();
                    return;
                }

                if (this.state.activeOverlay) {
                    if (event.key === 'Escape') {
                        event.preventDefault();
                        this.closeActiveOverlay();
                    }
                    return;
                }

                if (this.state.isAnimating) return;

                const keyMap = {
                    'ArrowDown': () => this.zoomIn(), 'PageDown': () => this.zoomIn(),
                    'ArrowUp': () => this.zoomOut(), 'PageUp': () => this.zoomOut(),
                    'Home': () => this.resetZoom(), 'End': () => this.changeLevel(this.constants.NUM_LEVELS - 1),
                };
                if (keyMap[event.key]) { event.preventDefault(); keyMap[event.key](); }
            }

            handleTouchMove(e) {
                if (this.state.isAnimating || this.state.activeOverlay) return;
                const touchEndY = e.touches[0].clientY;
                const deltaY = this.state.touchStartY - touchEndY;
                if (Math.abs(deltaY) > 50) {
                    if (deltaY > 0) this.zoomIn(); else this.zoomOut();
                    this.state.touchStartY = touchEndY; // Reset after a successful swipe
                }
            }

            zoomIn() { this.changeLevel(this.state.currentLevel + 1); }
            zoomOut() { this.changeLevel(this.state.currentLevel - 1); }
            resetZoom() { this.changeLevel(0); }

            // --- Overlay Logic ---
            openOverlay(overlayElement, type, triggerElement) {
                this.state.lastFocusedElement = triggerElement || document.activeElement;
                this.dom.body.classList.add('overlay-active');
                this.dom.appContainer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
                overlayElement.classList.remove('hidden');
                this.state.activeOverlay = type;
                this.state.focusTrap = new FocusTrap(overlayElement);
                this.state.focusTrap.activate();
                const firstFocusable = overlayElement.querySelector('button, [href], input, select, textarea, [tabindex]:not([tabindex="-1"])');
                if (firstFocusable) firstFocusable.focus();
            }

            closeOverlay(overlayElement) {
                if (!this.state.activeOverlay) return;
                this.dom.body.classList.remove('overlay-active');
                this.dom.appContainer.removeAttribute('aria-hidden');
                overlayElement.classList.add('hidden');
                this.state.activeOverlay = null;
                if (this.state.focusTrap) this.state.focusTrap.deactivate();
                this.state.focusTrap = null;
                if (this.state.lastFocusedElement) this.state.lastFocusedElement.focus();
            }

            closeActiveOverlay() {
                switch(this.state.activeOverlay) {
                    case 'poi': this.hidePoiModal(); break;
                    case 'database': this.hideDatabase(); break;
                    case 'help': this.hideHelpModal(); break;
                }
            }

            showPoiModal(title, info, triggerElement) {
                this.dom.modalTitle.textContent = title;
                this.dom.modalInfo.innerHTML = `<p>${info}</p>`;
                this.openOverlay(this.dom.poiModal, 'poi', triggerElement);
            }

            hidePoiModal() {
                this.closeOverlay(this.dom.poiModal);
            }

            showDatabase(levelIndex, triggerElement) {
                const data = COSMIC_DATA[levelIndex].database;
                if (!data) return;
                this.dom.dbTitle.textContent = data.title;
                this.dom.dbInfo.innerHTML = data.info;
                this.dom.dbGallery.innerHTML = data.gallery.map(img => `<img src="${img.src}" alt="${img.alt}" loading="lazy" tabindex="0">`).join('');
                this.openOverlay(this.dom.databaseOverlay, 'database', triggerElement);
            }

            hideDatabase() {
                this.closeOverlay(this.dom.databaseOverlay);
            }

            showHelpModal(triggerElement) {
                this.openOverlay(this.dom.helpModal, 'help', triggerElement);
            }

            hideHelpModal() {
                this.closeOverlay(this.dom.helpModal);
            }

            // --- Customization & Settings ---
            togglePanel(forceOpen = null) {
                const isVisible = this.dom.controlPanel.classList.toggle('visible', forceOpen);
                this.dom.panelToggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', isVisible);
            }

            applyTheme(themeName) {
                const theme = THEMES[themeName];
                for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(theme)) {
                    this.dom.root.style.setProperty(key, value);
                }
                this.state.settings.theme = themeName;
                this.saveSettings();
            }

            saveSettings() {
                try {
                    localStorage.setItem('cosmicJourneySettings', JSON.stringify(this.state.settings));
                } catch (e) {
                    console.warn('Could not save settings to localStorage.');
                }
            }

            loadSettings() {
                const defaults = { theme: 'Cosmic Purple', audio: 'Deep Space Drone', firstVisit: true };
                try {
                    const saved = localStorage.getItem('cosmicJourneySettings');
                    return saved ? { ...defaults, ...JSON.parse(saved), firstVisit: false } : defaults;
                } catch (e) {
                    console.warn('Could not load settings from localStorage.');
                    return defaults;
                }
            }

            // --- Audio Engine ---
            initAudio() {
                if (this.state.audioInitialized) return;
                this.audio.context = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
                if (this.audio.context.state === 'suspended') this.audio.context.resume();
                this.audio.masterGain = this.audio.context.createGain();
                this.audio.masterGain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.3, this.audio.context.currentTime);
                this.audio.masterGain.connect(this.audio.context.destination);
                this.state.audioInitialized = true;
            }

            setAudioTrack(trackName) {
                if (!this.state.audioInitialized) return;
                
                this.audio.sources.forEach(s => {
                    s.gainNode.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(0, this.audio.context.currentTime + 0.5);
                    if(s.node.stop) s.node.stop(this.audio.context.currentTime + 0.5);
                });
                this.audio.sources = [];

                const trackDefs = AUDIO_TRACKS[trackName];
                trackDefs.forEach(def => {
                    const source = {};
                    const gainNode = this.audio.context.createGain();
                    gainNode.gain.setValueAtTime(0, this.audio.context.currentTime);
                    gainNode.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(def.gain, this.audio.context.currentTime + 1.0);
                    gainNode.connect(this.audio.masterGain);
                    source.gainNode = gainNode;

                    if (def.type.includes('noise')) {
                        const bufferSize = 2 * this.audio.context.sampleRate;
                        const buffer = this.audio.context.createBuffer(1, bufferSize, this.audio.context.sampleRate);
                        const output = buffer.getChannelData(0);
                        let lastOut = 0;
                        for (let i = 0; i < bufferSize; i++) { const white = Math.random() * 2 - 1; output[i] = (lastOut + (0.02 * white)) / 1.02; lastOut = output[i]; output[i] *= 3.5; }
                        const noise = this.audio.context.createBufferSource();
                        noise.buffer = buffer; noise.loop = true; noise.start(0);
                        source.node = noise;
                    } else {
                        const osc = this.audio.context.createOscillator();
                        osc.type = def.type; osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(def.freq, this.audio.context.currentTime); osc.start();
                        source.node = osc;
                    }

                    if (def.filter) {
                        const filter = this.audio.context.createBiquadFilter();
                        filter.type = 'lowpass'; filter.frequency.setValueAtTime(def.filter, this.audio.context.currentTime);
                        source.node.connect(filter); filter.connect(gainNode);
                    } else {
                        source.node.connect(gainNode);
                    }
                    this.audio.sources.push(source);
                });
                this.state.settings.audio = trackName;
                this.saveSettings();
            }

            // --- Starfield Canvas ---
            initStarfield() {
                this.resizeStarfield();
                this.createStars();
                this.animateStarfield();
            }

            resizeStarfield() {
                this.dom.starfieldCanvas.width = window.innerWidth;
                this.dom.starfieldCanvas.height = window.innerHeight;
                this.stars = [];
                this.createStars();
            }

            createStars() {
                for (let i = 0; i < this.constants.STAR_COUNT; i++) {
                    this.stars.push({
                        x: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2000,
                        y: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2000,
                        z: Math.random() * 2000,
                    });
                }
            }

            animateStarfield() {
                const centerX = this.dom.starfieldCanvas.width / 2;
                const centerY = this.dom.starfieldCanvas.height / 2;
                const baseSpeed = this.state.isAnimating ? 10 : 0.5;
                const speed = baseSpeed + (this.state.currentLevel * 0.5);

                this.starfieldCtx.fillStyle = 'rgba(1, 0, 10, 0.2)'; // Trail effect
                this.starfieldCtx.fillRect(0, 0, this.dom.starfieldCanvas.width, this.dom.starfieldCanvas.height);
                this.starfieldCtx.fillStyle = getComputedStyle(this.dom.root).getPropertyValue('--star-color');

                this.stars.forEach(star => {
                    star.z -= speed;
                    if (star.z <= 0) {
                        star.x = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2000;
                        star.y = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2000;
                        star.z = 2000;
                    }

                    const k = 256 / star.z;
                    const px = star.x * k + centerX;
                    const py = star.y * k + centerY;

                    if (px > 0 && px < this.dom.starfieldCanvas.width && py > 0 && py < this.dom.starfieldCanvas.height) {
                        const size = (1 - star.z / 2000) * 4;
                        this.starfieldCtx.beginPath();
                        this.starfieldCtx.arc(px, py, size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                        this.starfieldCtx.fill();
                    }
                });

                requestAnimationFrame(this.animateStarfield.bind(this));
            }

            // --- Utilities ---
            debounce(func, delay) {
                let timeout;
                return (...args) => {
                    clearTimeout(timeout);
                    timeout = setTimeout(() => func.apply(this, args), delay);
                };
            }

            updateLiveRegion() {
                const levelTitle = COSMIC_DATA[this.state.currentLevel].title;
                this.dom.liveRegion.textContent = `Now viewing: ${levelTitle}`;
            }
        }

        window.addEventListener('load', () => {
            new CosmicJourney();
        });
    </script>
</body>
</html>
