return (...args) => { clearTimeout(timeout); timeout = setTimeout(() => func.apply(this, args), delay); }; } updateLiveRegion() { const levelTitle = COSMIC_DATA[this.state.currentLevel].title; this.dom.liveRegion.textContent = `Now viewing: ${levelTitle}`; } } window.addEventListener('load', () => { new CosmicJourney(); });

iterations.generatedHtml:
The Universe

An infinite journey awaits.

The Milky Way

Our home, a barred spiral galaxy containing over 200 billion stars, including our Sun.

The Solar System

A star and the objects that travel in orbit around it, bound together by gravity.

Planet Earth

A pale blue dot. The only known astronomical object to harbor and support life.

The Journey Continues

Exploration is in our nature. Our curiosity is the spark that lights the way to the stars.

Scroll to Explore
suggestedFeatures: STABILIZATION: Refactor the entire scroll-zoom engine for performance and user experience. Replace the current method of scaling the entire container with a more robust animation-driven approach, such as using a library like GSAP's ScrollTrigger. This will create smoother, easing-based transitions between zoom layers and prevent performance bottlenecks and visual jank on less powerful devices.

STABILIZATION: Implement mobile/touch-based controls and optimize background animations. The current wheel-event logic is non-functional on touch devices. Add support for touch-drag gestures to control the zoom. Simultaneously, replace the performance-intensive CSS radial-gradient starfield with a lightweight HTML <canvas> element to render the starfield, significantly improving rendering performance and allowing for more dynamic effects.

NEW FEATURE: Add interactive 'Points of Interest' to each zoom layer. Place small, clickable hotspot icons on the galaxy, solar system, and Earth visuals. Clicking a hotspot will reveal a modal window or overlay displaying a high-resolution image (e.g., from the Hubble Telescope) and a concise, fascinating fact about the selected object, turning the passive viewing experience into an active exploration.

NEW FEATURE: Implement a 'Cosmic Scale' navigation timeline. Add a persistent but minimalist UI element (e.g., a vertical line on the side of the screen) that visually represents the entire journey from the universe to Earth. This timeline should show the user's current position and allow them to click on different nodes (e.g., 'Galaxy', 'Solar System') to instantly and smoothly animate to that specific section, improving navigation and accessibility.

NEW FEATURE: Integrate real-time space data via a public API. Add a dynamic content module that fetches and displays live information, such as NASA's 'Astronomy Picture of the Day' on the intro screen or a counter showing the current number of astronauts in space. This makes the website feel alive, current, and encourages repeat visits to see new content.

iterations.generatedHtml:
Skip to content

Connecting to deep space network...

Universe Galaxy Solar System Earth Beyond

The Universe

An infinite journey awaits.

The Milky Way

Our home, a vast barred spiral galaxy. It contains 100 to 400 billion stars and at least that many planets. The Sun is just one of them, located in a minor spiral arm.

The Solar System

Our Sun and the celestial bodies bound to it by gravity. This intricate dance includes eight planets, their moons, and countless asteroids, comets, and other icy worlds.

Planet Earth

A pale blue dot, vibrant with life. Its unique atmosphere and liquid water have allowed life to flourish, creating the only known haven for consciousness in the cosmos.

The Journey Continues

Exploration is in our nature. Our curiosity is the spark that lights the way to the stars.

Scroll to Explore
suggestedFeatures: STABILIZATION: Fix critical JavaScript and visual bugs by refactoring the main `App` object into a valid structure and implementing logic to make the Point of Interest (POI) buttons rotate in sync with their parent animated visuals (e.g., the galaxy) to maintain their relative screen positions.

STABILIZATION: Boost performance and architecture by using GSAP ScrollTrigger's `onEnter` and `onLeave` callbacks to pause all CSS and JavaScript animations for sections not currently in the viewport, and refactor the project into separate HTML, CSS, and JavaScript files for maintainability.

NEW FEATURE: Implement 'Seamless Zoom Transitions' by enhancing the GSAP animation to create the illusion of flying directly into a specific point of the previous scene (e.g., the galaxy's center) which then fluidly expands to become the next scene (the solar system), creating a more immersive and true-to-concept infinite zoom.

NEW FEATURE: Develop an 'Interactive Solar System Orrery' by expanding the current visual to include all eight planets with more accurate relative orbit sizes and speeds. Make each planet a clickable POI that opens the modal with unique factual data and a high-resolution image for that specific planet.

NEW FEATURE: Add a 'Live Exoplanet Counter' by integrating with the NASA Exoplanet Archive API to display the real-time count of confirmed discovered exoplanets. Make this counter clickable, opening a modal that highlights a recently discovered or notable exoplanet with its key characteristics.

iterations.generatedRawHtml:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>The Universe: An Infinite Journey</title>
    <meta name="description" content="An interactive, animated, infinite-zoom exploration of the universe, from the vast cosmos down to our planet.">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://api.nasa.gov">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://api.open-notify.org">
    <style>
        :root {
            --color-background: #01020d;
            --color-text: #d0d0e0;
            --color-primary: #a7b5ff;
            --color-secondary: #f7a8ff;
            --color-accent: #60c5ff;
            --color-glow: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
            --font-sans: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif;
            --font-serif: 'Lora', serif;
            --ease-out-quart: cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1);
            --ease-in-out-cubic: cubic-bezier(0.65, 0, 0.35, 1);
            --z-background: -1;
            --z-content: 1;
            --z-ui: 100;
            --z-modal: 1000;
        }

        *, *::before, *::after {
            box-sizing: border-box;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            font-variant-ligatures: none;
        }

        html {
            font-size: 16px;
            scroll-behavior: smooth;
            background-color: var(--color-background);
        }

        body {
            background-color: var(--color-background);
            color: var(--color-text);
            font-family: var(--font-sans);
            min-height: 100vh;
            width: 100%;
            overflow-x: hidden;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
            text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;
            transition: background-color 0.5s var(--ease-in-out-cubic);
        }
        body.is-loading {
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        /* Accessibility utility */
        .visually-hidden {
            position: absolute;
            width: 1px;
            height: 1px;
            padding: 0;
            margin: -1px;
            overflow: hidden;
            clip: rect(0, 0, 0, 0);
            white-space: nowrap;
            border: 0;
        }        .skip-to-content {
            position: absolute;
            top: -100px;
            left: 1rem;
            background: var(--color-primary);
            color: var(--color-background);
            padding: 0.5rem 1rem;
            border-radius: 0 0 8px 8px;
            z-index: var(--z-modal);
            transition: top 0.3s var(--ease-in-out-cubic);
            text-decoration: none;
            font-weight: bold;
        }
        .skip-to-content:focus {
            top: 0;
        }
        
        #starfield-canvas {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            z-index: var(--z-background);
            pointer-events: none;
            isolation: isolate; /* New stacking context */
        }

        /* Main Container */
        #universe-container {
            width: 100%;
            position: relative;
            perspective: 1000px;
        }

        /* Zoom Layers */
        .zoom-layer {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100vh; /* Full viewport height for each section */
            display: grid;
            place-items: center;
            text-align: center;
            padding: 2rem;
            position: relative;
            z-index: var(--z-content);
            will-change: transform, opacity;
        }

        .zoom-content {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            position: relative;
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 1200px;
            gap: 1.5rem;
            isolation: isolate;
        }
        
        /* Typography */
        h1, h2 {
            text-shadow: 0 0 10px var(--color-glow), 0 0 20px var(--color-primary), 0 0 35px var(--color-primary);
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            font-weight: 700;
            line-height: 1.1;
        }

        .title {
            font-size: clamp(3rem, 10vw, 8rem);
            animation: pulse-light 5s infinite ease-in-out;
        }

        h2 {
            font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 8vw, 6rem);
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }
        
        p {
            font-size: clamp(1rem, 1.5vw + 0.5rem, 1.25rem);
            max-width: 65ch;
            line-height: 1.7;
            text-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
            color: var(--color-text);
            font-family: var(--font-serif);
        }

        .subtitle {
            font-size: clamp(1.2rem, 3vw, 2rem);
            color: var(--color-primary);
            animation: pulse-light 5s 1s infinite ease-in-out;
        }

        @keyframes pulse-light {
            0%, 100% { text-shadow: 0 0 10px var(--color-glow), 0 0 20px var(--color-primary), 0 0 30px var(--color-secondary); }
            50% { text-shadow: 0 0 15px var(--color-glow), 0 0 30px var(--color-primary), 0 0 45px var(--color-secondary); }
        }

        /* Visual Elements */
        .galaxy-visual {
            width: clamp(250px, 30vw, 400px);
            height: clamp(250px, 30vw, 400px);
            position: relative;
            animation: slow-rotate 80s linear infinite;
            --rotation-duration: 80s;
            --poi-sag-a-top: 50%;
            --poi-sag-a-left: 50%;
        }
        .galaxy-visual::before, .galaxy-visual::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            left: 0;
            top: 0;
            background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, transparent 30%, var(--color-primary) 32%, var(--color-secondary) 34%, transparent 45%);
            border-radius: 50%;
            mask-image: conic-gradient(from 0deg, black, transparent, black, transparent, black);
        }
        .galaxy-visual::after {
            transform: scale(0.7) rotate(60deg);
        }

        .solar-system-visual {
            width: clamp(300px, 40vmin, 500px);
            height: clamp(300px, 40vmin, 500px);
            position: relative;
            display: grid;
            place-items: center;
            --poi-earth-planet-top: 0%;
            --poi-earth-planet-left: 0%;
        }
        .sun-visual {
            grid-area: 1 / 1;
            width: 25%;
            height: 25%;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, #fff700, #ffc300, #ff8c00);
            border-radius: 50%;
            box-shadow: 0 0 50px #ffc300, 0 0 100px #ff8c00;
            animation: pulse-sun 6s infinite ease-in-out;
        }
        .planet-orbit {
            grid-area: 1 / 1;
            width: var(--orbit-size);
            height: var(--orbit-size);
            border: 1px solid rgba(167, 181, 255, 0.15);
            border-radius: 50%;
            animation: slow-rotate var(--orbit-duration) linear infinite;
            position: relative;
        }
        .planet {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: 0;
            width: var(--planet-size);
            height: var(--planet-size);
            border-radius: 50%;
            background-color: var(--planet-color);
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            box-shadow: inset 2px -2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
        }
        #mercury {--orbit-size: 38%; --orbit-duration: 12s; --planet-size: 3px; --planet-color: #9f8d7c;}
        #venus {--orbit-size: 48%; --orbit-duration: 20s; --planet-size: 6px; --planet-color: #e6a876;}
        #earth-planet {--orbit-size: 60%; --orbit-duration: 30s; --planet-size: 7px; --planet-color: #4f8ab5;}
        #mars {--orbit-size: 72%; --orbit-duration: 45s; --planet-size: 4px; --planet-color: #c1440e;}
        #jupiter {--orbit-size: 88%; --orbit-duration: 90s; --planet-size: 20px; --planet-color: #d8caab;}
        #saturn {--orbit-size: 108%; --orbit-duration: 150s; --planet-size: 18px; --planet-color: #e3d9b1;}
        #uranus {--orbit-size: 125%; --orbit-duration: 220s; --planet-size: 12px; --planet-color: #afdbf5;}
        #neptune {--orbit-size: 140%; --orbit-duration: 300s; --planet-size: 11px; --planet-color: #3e54e8;}

        .planet-ring {
            position: absolute;
            width: 150%; height: 150%;
            top: -25%; left: -25%;
            border: 1px solid rgba(227, 217, 177, 0.5);
            border-radius: 50%;
            transform: rotateX(70deg);
        }
        
        .earth-visual {
            width: clamp(280px, 35vmin, 450px);
            height: clamp(280px, 35vmin, 450px);
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at 30% 30%, #a0c0ff, #0055aa 70%);
            box-shadow: inset 5vmin -5vmin 5vmin rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 0 20px var(--color-accent), 0 0 50px #0055aa, 0 0 80px var(--color-primary) inset;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
            animation: slow-rotate 40s linear infinite;
            --rotation-duration: 40s;
            --poi-iss-top: 40%;
            --poi-iss-left: 60%;
        }
        .earth-visual::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 0; left: 0;
            width: 200%;
            height: 100%;
            background-image: url('data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="600" height="300"><path d="M10 150 C 50 100, 100 100, 150 150 S 250 200, 300 150 S 400 100, 450 150 S 550 200, 600 150" fill="none" stroke="rgba(140, 200, 140, 0.7)" stroke-width="60" stroke-linecap="round" /></svg>');
            background-size: 300px 300px;
            animation: slide-clouds 20s linear infinite;
            opacity: 0.5;
        }
        
        @keyframes slow-rotate {
            from { transform: rotate(0deg); }
            to { transform: rotate(360deg); }
        }
        @keyframes pulse-sun {
            0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 0 50px #ffc300, 0 0 100px #ff8c00; }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 0 60px #ffc300, 0 0 120px #ff8c00; }
        }

        .poi {
            position: absolute;
            width: 28px;
            height: 28px;
            background-color: var(--color-secondary);
            border: 2px solid var(--color-glow);
            border-radius: 50%;
            cursor: pointer;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            z-index: var(--z-ui);
            box-shadow: 0 0 10px var(--color-secondary);
            animation: pulse-poi 2s infinite ease-in-out, counter-rotate var(--rotation-duration, 50s) linear infinite reverse;
            transition: transform 0.3s var(--ease-out-quart), background-color 0.3s var(--ease-in-out-cubic);
            top: var(--poi-top, 50%);
            left: var(--poi-left, 50%);
        }
        .solar-system-visual .poi {
            width: 18px;
            height: 18px;
        }

        @keyframes counter-rotate {
            from { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(0deg); }
            to { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(360deg); }
        }
        .poi:hover, .poi:focus-visible {
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.3);
            background-color: var(--color-glow);
            outline: none;
        }
        .poi:focus-visible {
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--color-background), 0 0 0 5px var(--color-accent);
        }
        @keyframes pulse-poi {
            0% { box-shadow: 0 0 5px var(--color-secondary), 0 0 10px var(--color-glow); }
            50% { box-shadow: 0 0 15px var(--color-secondary), 0 0 25px var(--color-glow); }
            100% { box-shadow: 0 0 5px var(--color-secondary), 0 0 10px var(--color-glow); }
        }

        /* Modal */
        .modal-dialog {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0; left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            display: grid; /* Use grid for centering */
            place-items: center;
            z-index: var(--z-modal);
            padding: 1rem;
        }

        .modal-dialog::backdrop {
            background-color: rgba(1, 2, 13, 0.8);
            backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
        }

        .modal-content {
            background-color: var(--color-background);
            border: 1px solid var(--color-primary);
            padding: clamp(1.5rem, 5vw, 2.5rem);
            border-radius: 12px;
            max-width: 700px;
            width: 100%;
            max-height: 90vh;
            overflow-y: auto;
            box-shadow: 0 0 40px var(--color-primary), 0 0 80px var(--color-secondary);
            animation: fade-in-up 0.5s var(--ease-out-quart) forwards;
        }
        .modal-close {
            position: absolute;
            top: 1rem;
            right: 1rem;
            background: transparent;
            border: 2px solid transparent;
            color: var(--color-text);
            font-size: 2rem;
            cursor: pointer;
            width: 44px;
            height: 44px;
            display: grid;
            place-items: center;
            border-radius: 50%;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }
        .modal-close:hover {
            color: var(--color-primary);
            background: rgba(167, 181, 255, 0.1);
        }
        .modal-close:focus-visible {
            outline: none;
            border-color: var(--color-accent);
            box-shadow: 0 0 10px var(--color-accent);
        }
        .modal-content img {
            max-width: 100%;
            height: auto;
            border-radius: 4px;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            background-color: #111;
        }
        .modal-content h3 {
            color: var(--color-primary);
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }        @keyframes fade-in-up {
            from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); }
            to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
        }

        /* Timeline */
        .cosmic-timeline {
            position: fixed;
            top: 50%;
            right: 2rem;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 1.5rem;
            z-index: var(--z-ui);
        }
        .timeline-node {
            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
            appearance: none;
            background-color: transparent;
            border: 2px solid var(--color-primary);
            border-radius: 50%;
            cursor: pointer;
            position: relative;
            transition: background-color 0.3s var(--ease-in-out-cubic), transform 0.3s var(--ease-out-quart);
            display: block;
            padding: 0;
        }
        .timeline-node:hover,
        .timeline-node:focus-visible,
        .timeline-node[aria-current="true"] {
            background-color: var(--color-primary);
            transform: scale(1.3);
            box-shadow: 0 0 15px var(--color-primary);
        }
        .timeline-node:focus-visible { 
            outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent);
            outline-offset: 4px;
        }
        .timeline-label {
            position: absolute;
            right: 180%;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%) translateX(0.5rem);
            color: var(--color-text);
            background: rgba(1, 2, 13, 0.8);
            padding: 0.3rem 0.7rem;
            border-radius: 4px;
            white-space: nowrap;
            opacity: 0;
            visibility: hidden;
            transition: all 0.3s var(--ease-out-quart);
            pointer-events: none;
        }
        .timeline-node:hover .timeline-label,
        .timeline-node:focus-visible .timeline-label {
            opacity: 1;
            visibility: visible;
            transform: translateY(-50%) translateX(-0.5rem);
        }

        /* API Content */
        #api-corner {
            position: fixed;
            top: 1.5rem;
            left: 1.5rem;
            z-index: var(--z-ui);
            background: rgba(1, 2, 13, 0.7);
            backdrop-filter: blur(5px);
            padding: 0.75rem 1.25rem;
            border-radius: 8px;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            border: 1px solid rgba(167, 181, 255, 0.2);
            transition: opacity 0.3s;
        }
        #apod-container {
            margin-top: 2rem;
            max-width: 500px;
            width: 100%;
            border: 1px solid var(--color-primary);
            padding: 1.5rem;
            border-radius: 12px;
            background: rgba(1, 2, 13, 0.5);
            backdrop-filter: blur(3px);
            text-align: left;
        }
        #apod-container img {
            max-width: 100%;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }
        #apod-container figcaption {
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            margin-top: 0.5rem;
            color: var(--color-secondary);
        }

        @keyframes slide-clouds {
            from { transform: translateX(0); }
            to { transform: translateX(-300px); }
        }

        /* UI Elements */
        .scroll-prompt {
            position: fixed;
            bottom: 2rem;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            color: var(--color-primary);
            opacity: 1;
            transition: opacity 0.5s ease;
            z-index: 100;
        }
        .scroll-prompt.hidden {
            opacity: 0;
        }
        .scroll-mouse {
            width: 24px;
            height: 40px;
            border: 2px solid var(--color-primary);
            border-radius: 12px;
            position: relative;
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }
        .scroll-wheel {
            width: 4px;
            height: 8px;
            background-color: var(--color-primary);
            border-radius: 2px;
            position: absolute;
            top: 6px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            animation: scroll-anim 2s infinite;
        }
        @keyframes scroll-anim {
            0% { transform: translate(-50%, 0); opacity: 1; }
            50% { transform: translate(-50%, 10px); opacity: 1; }
            100% { transform: translate(-50%, 20px); opacity: 0; }
        }

        button {
            background: transparent;
            border: 2px solid var(--color-primary);
            color: var(--color-primary);
            padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem;
            font-size: 1rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            margin-top: 2rem;
            box-shadow: 0 0 5px var(--color-primary), inset 0 0 5px var(--color-primary);
        }
        button:hover, button:focus-visible {
            background-color: var(--color-primary);
            color: var(--color-background);
            box-shadow: 0 0 25px var(--color-primary);
            outline: none;
        }
        button:focus-visible {
            outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent);
            outline-offset: 4px;
        }
        button:active {
            transform: translateY(1px) scale(0.98);
        }


        @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
            *, *::before, *::after {
                animation-delay: -1ms !important;
                animation-duration: 1ms !important;
                animation-iteration-count: 1 !important;
                background-attachment: initial !important;
                scroll-behavior: auto !important;
                transition-delay: 0s !important;
                transition-duration: 0s !important;
            }
        }
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .cosmic-timeline {
                right: 1rem;
                gap: 1.25rem;
            }
            .timeline-node { width: 16px; height: 16px; }
            .timeline-label { display: none; }
        }
    </style>
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/gsap/3.12.5/gsap.min.js" integrity="sha512-7eHRwcbYkK4d9g/6tD/bb/EuYAOCQBDkaGSksECEbbSRXMbeHXGNzATHEyAbStEUOuayuhkyCNTdOyH5a5Eig==" crossorigin="anonymous" referrerpolicy="no-referrer"></script>
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/gsap/3.12.5/ScrollTrigger.min.js" integrity="sha512-onMTRKJBKz8M1TnqqDuGBlowlH0ohFzMXYRNebz+yOcc5TQr/zIpc5BgwmHucNg8GEdwm7b5sUT4CFjZdgCQkA==" crossorigin="anonymous" referrerpolicy="no-referrer"></script>
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/gsap/3.12.5/ScrollToPlugin.min.js" integrity="sha512-gSvuNGGO5Ktd2jK/fgag2vrLUPc9VKmMp0MA76ESkeA5KAtR0OTsSgZV2eG8pPcFbV5aTvo1d_gUjDdaODkHPA==" crossorigin="anonymous" referrerpolicy="no-referrer"></script>
</head>
<body class="is-loading">
    <a href="#content-start" class="skip-to-content">Skip to content</a>
    <canvas id="starfield-canvas" aria-hidden="true"></canvas>

    <div id="api-corner">
        <p id="astronaut-count">Connecting to deep space network...</p>
        <button type="button" id="exoplanet-container" aria-live="polite">
            <span id="exoplanet-count">Searching for new worlds...</span>
        </button>
    </div>

    <nav class="cosmic-timeline" aria-label="Cosmic Scale Navigation">
        <a href="#intro" data-index="0" class="timeline-node" aria-label="Go to Universe View" aria-current="true">
            <span class="timeline-label">Universe</span>
        </a>
        <a href="#galaxy" data-index="1" class="timeline-node" aria-label="Go to Galaxy View">
            <span class="timeline-label">Galaxy</span>
        </a>
        <a href="#solarsystem" data-index="2" class="timeline-node" aria-label="Go to Solar System View">
            <span class="timeline-label">Solar System</span>
        </a>
        <a href="#earth" data-index="3" class="timeline-node" aria-label="Go to Earth View">
            <span class="timeline-label">Earth</span>
        </a>
        <a href="#outro" data-index="4" class="timeline-node" aria-label="Go to Conclusion">
            <span class="timeline-label">Beyond</span>
        </a>
    </nav>

    <main id="universe-container" aria-label="Interactive Universe Exploration">
        <div id="content-start" tabindex="-1"></div>

        <section class="zoom-layer" id="intro" aria-labelledby="intro-title">
            <div class="zoom-content">
                <h1 class="title" id="intro-title">The Universe</h1>
                <p class="subtitle">An infinite journey awaits.</p>
                <figure id="apod-container" role="figure" aria-labelledby="apod-caption">
                    <div class="placeholder" aria-hidden="true"></div>
                    <p>Connecting to NASA's image archive...</p>
                </figure>
            </div>
        </section>

        <section class="zoom-layer" id="galaxy" aria-labelledby="galaxy-title">
             <div class="zoom-content">
                <div class="galaxy-visual" role="img" aria-label="An animated representation of the Milky Way galaxy.">
                    <button class="poi" data-poi="sag-a" style="--poi-top: var(--poi-sag-a-top); --poi-left: var(--poi-sag-a-left);" aria-label="Point of Interest: Sagittarius A*"></button>
                </div>
                <h2 id="galaxy-title">The Milky Way</h2>
                <p>Our home, a vast barred spiral galaxy. It contains 100 to 400 billion stars and at least that many planets. The Sun is just one of them, located in a minor spiral arm.</p>
            </div>
        </section>

        <section class="zoom-layer" id="solarsystem" aria-labelledby="solarsystem-title">
            <div class="zoom-content">
                <div class="solar-system-visual" role="img" aria-label="An animated model of our solar system with eight orbiting planets.">
                    <div class="sun-visual" aria-hidden="true"></div>
                    <div class="planet-orbit" id="mercury" style="--rotation-duration: 12s;"><div class="planet"><button class="poi" data-poi="mercury" aria-label="Point of Interest: Mercury"></button></div></div>
                    <div class="planet-orbit" id="venus" style="--rotation-duration: 20s;"><div class="planet"><button class="poi" data-poi="venus" aria-label="Point of Interest: Venus"></button></div></div>
                    <div class="planet-orbit" id="earth-planet" style="--rotation-duration: 30s;"><div class="planet"><button class="poi" data-poi="earth-planet" aria-label="Point of Interest: Planet Earth"></button></div></div>
                    <div class="planet-orbit" id="mars" style="--rotation-duration: 45s;"><div class="planet"><button class="poi" data-poi="mars" aria-label="Point of Interest: Mars"></button></div></div>
                    <div class="planet-orbit" id="jupiter" style="--rotation-duration: 90s;"><div class="planet"><button class="poi" data-poi="jupiter" aria-label="Point of Interest: Jupiter"></button></div></div>
                    <div class="planet-orbit" id="saturn" style="--rotation-duration: 150s;"><div class="planet"><div class="planet-ring" aria-hidden="true"></div><button class="poi" data-poi="saturn" aria-label="Point of Interest: Saturn"></button></div></div>
                    <div class="planet-orbit" id="uranus" style="--rotation-duration: 220s;"><div class="planet"><button class="poi" data-poi="uranus" aria-label="Point of Interest: Uranus"></button></div></div>
                    <div class="planet-orbit" id="neptune" style="--rotation-duration: 300s;"><div class="planet"><button class="poi" data-poi="neptune" aria-label="Point of Interest: Neptune"></button></div></div>
                </div>
                <h2 id="solarsystem-title">The Solar System</h2>
                <p>Our Sun and the celestial bodies bound to it by gravity. This intricate dance includes eight planets, their moons, and countless asteroids, comets, and other icy worlds.</p>
            </div>
        </section>
        
        <section class="zoom-layer" id="earth" aria-labelledby="earth-title">
            <div class="zoom-content">
                <div class="earth-visual" role="img" aria-label="An animated representation of Planet Earth, with swirling clouds.">
                     <button class="poi" data-poi="iss" style="--poi-top: var(--poi-iss-top); --poi-left: var(--poi-iss-left);" aria-label="Point of Interest: International Space Station"></button>
                </div>
                <h2 id="earth-title">Planet Earth</h2>
                <p>A pale blue dot, vibrant with life. Its unique atmosphere and liquid water have allowed life to flourish, creating the only known haven for consciousness in the cosmos.</p>
            </div>
        </section>

        <section class="zoom-layer" id="outro" aria-labelledby="outro-title">
            <div class="zoom-content">
                <h2 id="outro-title">The Journey Continues</h2>
                <p>Exploration is in our nature. Our curiosity is the spark that lights the way to the stars.</p>
                <button type="button" id="reset-zoom">Begin Anew</button>
            </div>
        </section>
    </main>
    
    <div class="scroll-prompt" aria-hidden="true">
        <div class="scroll-mouse">
            <div class="scroll-wheel"></div>
        </div>
        <span>Scroll to Explore</span>
    </div>

    <dialog id="poi-modal" class="modal-dialog" aria-labelledby="modal-title" aria-describedby="modal-description">
        <div class="modal-content" role="document">
            <button class="modal-close" aria-label="Close details" data-close>
                <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" width="28" height="28" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 10.586l4.95-4.95 1.414 1.414-4.95 4.95 4.95 4.95-1.414 1.414-4.95-4.95-4.95 4.95-1.414-1.414 4.95-4.95-4.95-4.95L7.05 5.636z"></path></svg>
            </button>
            <img id="modal-image" src="" alt="">
            <h3 id="modal-title"></h3>
            <div id="modal-description-container">
                <p id="modal-description"></p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </dialog>
    
    <div id="sr-announcer" class="visually-hidden" aria-live="assertive" aria-atomic="true"></div>

    <script>
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
            const App = {
                DOM: {},
                STATE: {
                    currentSection: 0,
                    isModalOpen: false,
                    isStarfieldPaused: false
                },
                
                POI_DATA: {
                    'sag-a': { title: 'Sagittarius A*', description: 'The supermassive black hole at the center of the Milky Way, with a mass about 4 million times that of our Sun. Its immense gravity governs the orbits of stars at the galactic core.', image: 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/4/4e/Event_Horizon_Telescope_Sgr_A%2A_image.jpg/1024px-Event_Horizon_Telescope_Sgr_A%2A_image.jpg', alt: 'First image of the black hole Sagittarius A*' },
                    'iss': { title: 'International Space Station', description: 'A modular space station in low Earth orbit. It is a multinational collaborative project and the largest artificial object in space, serving as a microgravity and space environment research laboratory.', image: 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/f/f2/International_Space_Station_after_undocking_of_STS-132.jpg/1280px-International_Space_Station_after_undocking_of_STS-132.jpg', alt: 'The International Space Station orbiting Earth' },
                    'mercury': { title: 'Mercury', description: 'The smallest planet in our solar system and nearest to the Sun, it completes an orbit in just 88 Earth days. It has a cratered surface, resembling the Moon.', image: 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/d/d9/Mercury_in_color_-_Prockter07-edit1.jpg/1024px-Mercury_in_color_-_Prockter07-edit1.jpg', alt: 'Planet Mercury' },
                    'venus': { title: 'Venus', description: 'The second planet from the Sun, known for its thick, toxic atmosphere that traps heat in a runaway greenhouse effect, making it the hottest planet in our solar system.', image: 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/e/e5/Venus-real_color.jpg/1024px-Venus-real_color.jpg', alt: 'Planet Venus' },
                    'earth-planet': { title: 'Earth', description: 'Our homeworld, the third planet from the Sun. It is the only place in the known universe confirmed to host life, characterized by its vast oceans of liquid water and a dynamic atmosphere.', image: 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/97/The_Earth_seen_from_Apollo_17.jpg/1024px-The_Earth_seen_from_Apollo_17.jpg', alt: 'The Blue Marble, a photograph of Earth from Apollo 17' },
                    'mars': { title: 'Mars', description: 'The fourth planet from the Sun, often called the \"Red Planet\" due to its iron-rich dust. It has polar ice caps, canyons, and evidence of ancient floods.', image: 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/0/02/OSIRIS_Mars_true_color.jpg/1024px-OSIRIS_Mars_true_color.jpg', alt: 'Planet Mars' },
                    'jupiter': { title: 'Jupiter', description: 'The largest planet in our solar system, a gas giant with a mass more than two and a half times that of all the other planets combined. It is known for its Great Red Spot, a giant storm.', image: 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/2/2b/Jupiter_and_its_shrunken_Great_Red_Spot.jpg/1024px-Jupiter_and_its_shrunken_Great_Red_Spot.jpg', alt: 'Planet Jupiter' },
                    'saturn': { title: 'Saturn', description: 'The sixth planet from the Sun and the second-largest, famous for its extensive and spectacular ring system composed mostly of ice particles.', image: 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/c/c7/Saturn_during_Equinox.jpg/1280px-Saturn_during_Equinox.jpg', alt: 'Planet Saturn' },
                    'uranus': { title: 'Uranus', description: 'The seventh planet from the Sun, an ice giant with a unique feature: it rotates on its side, at an angle of almost 98 degrees to its orbit.', image: 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/3/3d/Uranus2.jpg/1024px-Uranus2.jpg', alt: 'Planet Uranus' },
                    'neptune': { title: 'Neptune', description: 'The eighth and most distant planet from the Sun. It is a dark, cold, and windy ice giant, with the fastest winds in the solar system.', image: 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/6/63/Neptune_-_Voyager_2_%2829347980845%29_flatten_crop.jpg/1024px-Neptune_-_Voyager_2_%2829347980845%29_flatten_crop.jpg', alt: 'Planet Neptune' },
                    'exoplanet-info': { title: 'Exoplanet TRAPPIST-1e', description: 'An Earth-sized exoplanet orbiting within the habitable zone of the ultracool dwarf star TRAPPIST-1, approximately 40 light-years away. It is considered one of the most promising potentially habitable exoplanets discovered so far.', image: 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/b/b3/PIA21422-TRAPPIST-1e-ArtistConcept-20170222.jpg/1280px-PIA21422-TRAPPIST-1e-ArtistConcept-20170222.jpg', alt: 'Artist\'s concept of TRAPPIST-1e' },
                },

                init() {
                    this.cacheDOM();
                    this.initStarfield();
                    this.initAPIs();
                    this.initModal();
                    this.initGSAP();
                    this.initNavigation();
                    this.initEventListeners();
                    window.setTimeout(() => this.DOM.body.classList.remove('is-loading'), 500);
                },

                cacheDOM() {
                    this.DOM.body = document.body;
                    this.DOM.starfieldCanvas = document.getElementById('starfield-canvas');
                    this.DOM.modal = document.getElementById('poi-modal');
                    this.DOM.announcer = document.getElementById('sr-announcer');
                    this.DOM.timelineNodes = document.querySelectorAll('.timeline-node');
                    this.DOM.sections = document.querySelectorAll('.zoom-layer');
                    this.DOM.scrollPrompt = document.querySelector('.scroll-prompt');
                    this.DOM.resetBtn = document.getElementById('reset-zoom');
                    this.DOM.astronautCount = document.getElementById('astronaut-count');
                    this.DOM.exoplanetBtn = document.getElementById('exoplanet-container');
                    this.DOM.exoplanetCount = document.getElementById('exoplanet-count');
                },
                
                debounce(fn, delay) {
                    let timeoutId;
                    return function(...args) {
                        clearTimeout(timeoutId);
                        timeoutId = setTimeout(() => fn.apply(this, args), delay);
                    };
                },

                truncateText(text, maxLength) {
                    if (text.length <= maxLength) return text;
                    let truncated = text.substr(0, maxLength);
                    return truncated.substr(0, Math.min(truncated.length, truncated.lastIndexOf(' '))) + '…';
                },

                initStarfield() {
                    const canvas = this.DOM.starfieldCanvas;
                    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
                    let stars = [];
                    let animationFrameId;

                    const setupStars = () => {
                        const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;
                        const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
                        canvas.width = rect.width * dpr;
                        canvas.height = rect.height * dpr;
                        ctx.scale(dpr, dpr);
                        const numStars = window.innerWidth > 768 ? 800 : 300;
                        stars = [];
                        for (let i = 0; i < numStars; i++) {
                            stars.push({
                                x: Math.random() * canvas.width / dpr,
                                y: Math.random() * canvas.height / dpr,
                                z: Math.random() * 2 + 0.5,
                                radius: Math.random() * 1.2 + 0.3,
                                alpha: Math.random() * 0.5 + 0.5
                            });
                        }
                    };

                    const drawStars = () => {
                        if (!this.STATE.isStarfieldPaused) {
                          const w = canvas.width / (window.devicePixelRatio || 1);
                          const h = canvas.height / (window.devicePixelRatio || 1);
                          ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
                          stars.forEach(star => {
                              ctx.beginPath();
                              ctx.arc(star.x, star.y, star.radius * star.z, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                              ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255, 255, 255, ${star.alpha})`;
                              ctx.fill();
                              star.y -= (0.1 * star.z) + 0.05;
                              if (star.y < 0) {
                                  star.y = h;
                                  star.x = Math.random() * w;
                              }
                          });
                        }
                        animationFrameId = requestAnimationFrame(drawStars);
                    };

                    setupStars();
                    drawStars();
                    window.addEventListener('resize', this.debounce(setupStars, 250));
                },

                async initAPIs() {
                    this.fetchAPOD();
                    this.fetchAstronauts();
                    this.fetchExoplanets();
                },

                async fetchAPOD() {
                    const container = document.getElementById('apod-container');
                    try {
                        const response = await fetch('https://api.nasa.gov/planetary/apod?api_key=DEMO_KEY');
                        if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`API error: ${response.status}`);
                        const data = await response.json();
                        container.innerHTML = '';
                        const img = document.createElement('img');
                        img.src = data.hdurl || data.url;
                        img.alt = data.title;
                        img.loading = 'lazy';
                        const figcaption = document.createElement('figcaption');
                        figcaption.id = 'apod-caption';
                        const title = document.createElement('strong');
                        title.textContent = data.title;
                        const explanation = document.createTextNode(`: ${this.truncateText(data.explanation, 200)}`);
                        figcaption.append(title, explanation);
                        container.append(img, figcaption);
                    } catch (error) {
                        console.error('APOD Fetch Error:', error);
                        container.innerHTML = '<p>Could not connect to NASA\'s image archive. Please try again later.</p>';
                    }
                },
                async fetchAstronauts() {
                    try {
                        const response = await fetch('https://api.open-notify.org/astros.json');
                        if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Network response was not ok');
                        const data = await response.json();
                        this.DOM.astronautCount.textContent = `${data.number} humans currently in space`;
                    } catch (error) {
                        console.error('Astronaut Fetch Error:', error);
                        this.DOM.astronautCount.textContent = 'Deep space network offline.';
                    }
                },
                async fetchExoplanets() {
                    try {
                        const response = await fetch('https://exoplanetarchive.ipac.caltech.edu/TAP/sync?query=select+count(pl_name)+from+pscomppars&format=json');
                        if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Network response was not ok');
                        const data = await response.json();
                        const count = data[0].count_pl_name;
                        this.DOM.exoplanetCount.textContent = `${count.toLocaleString()} exoplanets confirmed`;
                    } catch (error) {
                        console.error('Exoplanet Fetch Error:', error);
                        this.DOM.exoplanetCount.textContent = 'Exoplanet data unavailable.';
                    }
                },

                initModal() {
                    this.DOM.modal.addEventListener('close', () => this.STATE.isModalOpen = false);
                },

                openModal(poiKey) {
                    const data = this.POI_DATA[poiKey];
                    if (!data) return;
                    const modalImg = this.DOM.modal.querySelector('#modal-image');
                    modalImg.src = data.image;
                    modalImg.alt = data.alt;
                    this.DOM.modal.querySelector('#modal-title').textContent = data.title;
                    this.DOM.modal.querySelector('#modal-description').textContent = data.description;
                    this.STATE.isModalOpen = true;
                    this.DOM.modal.showModal();
                    this.DOM.announcer.textContent = `Details opened for: ${data.title}`;
                },

                closeModal() {
                    this.DOM.modal.close();
                },

                initGSAP() {
                    gsap.registerPlugin(ScrollTrigger, ScrollToPlugin);
                    const sections = this.DOM.sections;
                    const numSections = sections.length;

                    this.masterTimeline = gsap.timeline({
                        scrollTrigger: {
                            trigger: '#universe-container',
                            pin: true,
                            scrub: 1.5,
                            end: `+=${numSections * 1500}`,
                            onUpdate: (self) => this.updateNavState(self.progress),
                        }
                    });
                    this.masterTimeline.to(this.DOM.scrollPrompt, { autoAlpha: 0, duration: 0.1 }, 0);

                    sections.forEach((section, i) => {
                        const content = section.querySelector('.zoom-content');
                        ScrollTrigger.create({
                            trigger: section,
                            start: 'top top',
                            end: 'bottom top',
                            onEnter: () => section.classList.remove('is-paused'),
                            onLeave: () => section.classList.add('is-paused'),
                            onEnterBack: () => section.classList.remove('is-paused'),
                            onLeaveBack: () => section.classList.add('is-paused'),
                        });

                        if (i === 0) return;
                        const prevSection = sections[i - 1];
                        const prevContent = prevSection.querySelector('.zoom-content');
                        let zoomTarget = prevSection.querySelector('.poi');
                        if (!zoomTarget) zoomTarget = prevContent.querySelector('h1, h2'); // Fallback target

                        this.masterTimeline
                            .fromTo(content, 
                              { scale: 0.01, autoAlpha: 0, transformOrigin: '50% 50%' }, 
                              { scale: 1, autoAlpha: 1, ease: 'power2.inOut', duration: 2 }, 
                              `section-${i-1}`)
                            .to(prevContent, 
                              { scale: 30, autoAlpha: 0, ease: 'power2.in', duration: 1.8 }, 
                              `section-${i-1}`);
                    });
                },

                initNavigation() {
                    this.DOM.timelineNodes.forEach(node => {
                        node.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                            e.preventDefault();
                            const sectionIndex = parseInt(e.currentTarget.dataset.index, 10);
                            const progress = sectionIndex / (this.DOM.sections.length - 1);
                            gsap.to(window, {
                                scrollTo: { y: progress * this.masterTimeline.scrollTrigger.end, autoKill: false },
                                duration: 2,
                                ease: 'power3.inOut'
                            });
                        });
                    });
                    this.DOM.resetBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        gsap.to(window, { scrollTo: 0, duration: 2, ease: 'power3.inOut' });
                    });
                },
                updateNavState(progress) {
                    const numSections = this.DOM.sections.length;
                    let sectionIndex = Math.floor(progress * (numSections - 1) + 0.25);
                    sectionIndex = Math.min(sectionIndex, numSections - 1);

                    if (sectionIndex !== this.STATE.currentSection) {
                        this.STATE.currentSection = sectionIndex;
                        this.DOM.timelineNodes.forEach((node, i) => {
                            node.setAttribute('aria-current', i === sectionIndex ? 'true' : 'false');
                        });
                        const newSectionTitle = this.DOM.sections[sectionIndex].querySelector('h1, h2').textContent;
                        this.DOM.announcer.textContent = `Now viewing: ${newSectionTitle}`;
                    }
                },

                initEventListeners() {
                    document.querySelectorAll('.poi').forEach(btn => btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation();
                        this.openModal(e.currentTarget.dataset.poi);
                    }));
                    this.DOM.exoplanetBtn.addEventListener('click', () => this.openModal('exoplanet-info'));
                    this.DOM.modal.addEventListener('click', e => {
                        if (e.target.closest('[data-close]')) this.closeModal();
                    });
                    window.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
                        if (e.key === 'Escape' && this.STATE.isModalOpen) this.closeModal();
                    });
                },
            };

            App.init();
        });
    </script>
</body>
</html>

    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://api.nasa.gov" crossorigin>
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://api.open-notify.org" crossorigin>
    <style>
        :root {
            --color-background-deep: #01020d;
            --color-background-med: #0a0b1a;
            --color-background-light: #14162e;
            --color-text-primary: #e0e1f0;
            --color-text-secondary: #a0a2c0;
            --color-primary: #a7b5ff;
            --color-secondary: #f7a8ff;
            --color-accent: #60c5ff;
            --color-glow-light: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
            --font-sans: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif;
            --font-serif: 'Lora', 'Times New Roman', serif;
            --ease-out-quart: cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1);
            --ease-in-out-cubic: cubic-bezier(0.65, 0, 0.35, 1);
            --z-background: -1;
            --z-content: 1;
            --z-ui: 100;
            --z-modal: 1000;
            --z-loader: 1001;
            --radius-sm: 4px;
            --radius-md: 8px;
            --radius-lg: 16px;
            --radius-full: 9999px;
            --shadow-md: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
            --shadow-lg: 0 10px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
            --focus-outline-width: 3px;
            --focus-outline-offset: 2px;
        }

        *, *::before, *::after {
            box-sizing: border-box;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
        }

        html {
            font-size: 16px;
            scroll-behavior: smooth;
            background-color: var(--color-background-deep);
            scrollbar-color: var(--color-primary) var(--color-background-med);
            scrollbar-width: thin;
        }

        html::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 8px;
        }

        html::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: var(--color-background-med);
        }

        html::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background-color: var(--color-primary);
            border-radius: var(--radius-full);
            border: 2px solid var(--color-background-med);
        }

        body {
            background-color: var(--color-background-deep);
            color: var(--color-text-primary);
            font-family: var(--font-sans);
            min-height: 100vh;
            width: 100%;
            overflow-x: hidden;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
            transition: background-color 0.5s var(--ease-in-out-cubic);
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.5s var(--ease-in-out-cubic);
        }
        body.is-loaded {
            opacity: 1;
        }
        body.is-loading {
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        /* Accessibility utility */
        .visually-hidden {
            position: absolute;
            width: 1px;
            height: 1px;
            padding: 0;
            margin: -1px;
            overflow: hidden;
            clip: rect(0, 0, 0, 0);
            white-space: nowrap;
            border: 0;
        }        .skip-to-content {
            position: absolute;
            top: -10rem;
            left: 1rem;
            background: var(--color-primary);
            color: var(--color-background-deep);
            padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem;
            border-radius: 0 0 var(--radius-md) var(--radius-md);
            z-index: var(--z-loader);
            transition: top 0.3s var(--ease-in-out-cubic);
            text-decoration: none;
            font-weight: 700;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
        }
        .skip-to-content:focus {
            top: 0;
            outline: none;
        }
        
        #starfield-canvas {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            z-index: var(--z-background);
            pointer-events: none;
            isolation: isolate; /* New stacking context */
        }

        
        /* Loader */
        .loader {
            position: fixed;
            inset: 0;
            background-color: var(--color-background-deep);
            z-index: var(--z-loader);
            display: grid;
            place-items: center;
            transition: opacity 0.7s var(--ease-in-out-cubic), visibility 0.7s;
            opacity: 1;
            visibility: visible;
        }
        .loader.is-hidden {
            opacity: 0;
            visibility: hidden;
        }
        .loader-spinner {
            width: 60px;
            height: 60px;
            border: 4px solid var(--color-primary);
            border-top-color: transparent;
            border-radius: 50%;
            animation: spin 1s linear infinite;
        }
        @keyframes spin {
            to { transform: rotate(360deg); }
        }/* Main Container */
        #universe-container {
            width: 100%;
            position: relative;
            perspective: 1000px;
        }

        /* Zoom Layers */
        .zoom-layer {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100vh; /* Full viewport height for each section */
            display: grid;
            place-items: center;
            text-align: center;
            padding: 2rem;
            position: relative;
            z-index: var(--z-content);
            will-change: transform, opacity;
        }

        .zoom-content {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            position: relative;
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 1200px;
            gap: 1.5rem;
            isolation: isolate;
        }
        
        /* Typography */
        h1, h2, h3 {
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            font-weight: 700;
            line-height: 1.1;
            color: var(--color-text-primary);
        }

        h1, h2 {
            text-shadow: 0 0 10px var(--color-glow-light), 0 0 20px var(--color-primary), 0 0 35px var(--color-primary);
            will-change: text-shadow;
        }

        .title {
            font-size: clamp(3rem, 10vw, 8rem);
            animation: pulse-light 5s infinite ease-in-out;
        }

        h2 {
            font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 8vw, 6rem);
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }
        
        p {
            font-size: clamp(1rem, 1.5vw + 0.5rem, 1.25rem);

            line-height: 1.7;
            text-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
            color: var(--color-text-secondary);

        }

        .zoom-content p {
            color: var(--color-text-primary);
        }

        .subtitle {
            font-size: clamp(1.2rem, 3vw, 2rem);
            color: var(--color-primary);
            font-family: var(--font-sans);
            text-shadow: 0 0 10px var(--color-primary);
            animation: pulse-light 5s 1s infinite ease-in-out;
        }

        @keyframes pulse-light {
            0%, 100% { text-shadow: 0 0 10px var(--color-glow-light), 0 0 20px var(--color-primary), 0 0 30px var(--color-secondary); opacity: 0.9; }
            50% { text-shadow: 0 0 15px var(--color-glow-light), 0 0 30px var(--color-primary), 0 0 45px var(--color-secondary); opacity: 1; }
        }

        /* Visual Elements */
        .galaxy-visual {
            width: clamp(250px, 30vw, 400px);
            height: clamp(250px, 30vw, 400px);
            position: relative;
            animation: slow-rotate 80s linear infinite;
            --rotation-duration: 80s;
            --poi-sag-a-top: 50%;
            --poi-sag-a-left: 50%;
            will-change: transform;
        }
        .galaxy-visual::before, .galaxy-visual::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            left: 0;
            top: 0;
            background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, transparent 30%, var(--color-primary) 32%, var(--color-secondary) 34%, transparent 45%);
            border-radius: 50%;
            mask-image: conic-gradient(from 0deg, black, transparent, black, transparent, black);
        }
        .galaxy-visual::after {
            transform: scale(0.7) rotate(60deg);
        }

        .solar-system-visual {
            width: clamp(300px, 40vmin, 500px);
            height: clamp(300px, 40vmin, 500px);
            position: relative;
            display: grid;
            place-items: center;
            list-style: none;
        }
        .sun-visual {
            grid-area: 1 / 1;
            width: 25%;
            height: 25%;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, #fff700, #ffc300, #ff8c00);
            border-radius: 50%;
            box-shadow: 0 0 50px #ffc300, 0 0 100px #ff8c00;
            animation: pulse-sun 6s infinite ease-in-out;
            will-change: transform, box-shadow;
        }
        .planet-orbit {
            grid-area: 1 / 1;
            width: var(--orbit-size);
            height: var(--orbit-size);
            border: 1px solid rgba(167, 181, 255, 0.15);
            border-radius: 50%;
            animation: slow-rotate var(--orbit-duration) linear infinite;
            position: relative;
            list-style: none;
            will-change: transform;
        }
        .planet {
            position: absolute;
            top: 50%;
            left: 0;
            width: var(--planet-size);
            height: var(--planet-size);
            border-radius: 50%;
            background-color: var(--planet-color);
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            box-shadow: inset 2px -2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
            display: grid;
            place-items: center;
        }
        #mercury {--orbit-size: 38%; --orbit-duration: 12s; --planet-size: 3px; --planet-color: #9f8d7c;}
        #venus {--orbit-size: 48%; --orbit-duration: 20s; --planet-size: 6px; --planet-color: #e6a876;}
        #earth-planet {--orbit-size: 60%; --orbit-duration: 30s; --planet-size: 7px; --planet-color: #4f8ab5;}
        #mars {--orbit-size: 72%; --orbit-duration: 45s; --planet-size: 4px; --planet-color: #c1440e;}
        #jupiter {--orbit-size: 88%; --orbit-duration: 90s; --planet-size: 20px; --planet-color: #d8caab;}
        #saturn {--orbit-size: 108%; --orbit-duration: 150s; --planet-size: 18px; --planet-color: #e3d9b1;}
        #uranus {--orbit-size: 125%; --orbit-duration: 220s; --planet-size: 12px; --planet-color: #afdbf5;}
        #neptune {--orbit-size: 140%; --orbit-duration: 300s; --planet-size: 11px; --planet-color: #3e54e8;}

        .planet-ring {
            position: absolute;
            width: 150%; height: 150%;
            top: -25%; left: -25%;
            border: 1px solid rgba(227, 217, 177, 0.5);
            border-radius: 50%;
            transform: rotateX(70deg);
        }
        
        .earth-visual {
            width: clamp(280px, 35vmin, 450px);
            height: clamp(280px, 35vmin, 450px);
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at 30% 30%, #a0c0ff, #0055aa 70%);
            box-shadow: inset 5vmin -5vmin 5vmin rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 0 20px var(--color-accent), 0 0 50px #0055aa, 0 0 80px var(--color-primary) inset;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
            animation: slow-rotate 40s linear infinite;
            --rotation-duration: 40s;
            --poi-iss-top: 40%;
            --poi-iss-left: 60%;
            will-change: transform;
        }
        .earth-visual::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 0; left: 0;
            width: 200%;
            height: 100%;
            background-image: url('data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="600" height="300"><path d="M10 150 C 50 100, 100 100, 150 150 S 250 200, 300 150 S 400 100, 450 150 S 550 200, 600 150" fill="none" stroke="rgba(140, 200, 140, 0.7)" stroke-width="60" stroke-linecap="round" /></svg>');
            background-size: 300px 300px;
            animation: slide-clouds 20s linear infinite;
            opacity: 0.5;
        }
        
        @keyframes slow-rotate {
            from { transform: rotate(0deg); }
            to { transform: rotate(360deg); }
        }
        @keyframes pulse-sun {
            0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 0 50px #ffc300, 0 0 100px #ff8c00; }
            50% { transform: scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 0 60px #ffc300, 0 0 120px #ff8c00; }
        }

        .poi {
            position: absolute;
            width: 28px;
            height: 28px;
            background-color: var(--color-secondary);
            border: 2px solid var(--color-glow-light);
            border-radius: 50%;
            cursor: pointer;
            z-index: var(--z-content);
            box-shadow: 0 0 10px var(--color-secondary);
            animation: pulse-poi 2s infinite ease-in-out, counter-rotate var(--rotation-duration, 50s) linear infinite reverse;
            transition: transform 0.3s var(--ease-out-quart), background-color 0.3s var(--ease-in-out-cubic);
            top: var(--poi-top, 50%);
            left: var(--poi-left, 50%);
            will-change: transform, background-color, box-shadow;
        }
        .solar-system-visual .poi {
            width: 18px;
            height: 18px;
        }

        @keyframes counter-rotate {
            from { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(0deg); }
            to { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(360deg); }
        }
        .poi:hover, .poi:focus-visible {
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.3);
            background-color: var(--color-glow-light);
            outline: none;
        }
        .poi:focus-visible {
            outline: var(--focus-outline-width) solid var(--color-accent);
            outline-offset: var(--focus-outline-offset);
            box-shadow: 0 0 10px var(--color-secondary), 0 0 0 3px var(--color-background-deep);
        }
        @keyframes pulse-poi {
            0% { box-shadow: 0 0 5px var(--color-secondary), 0 0 10px var(--color-glow-light); }
            50% { box-shadow: 0 0 15px var(--color-secondary), 0 0 25px var(--color-glow-light); }
            100% { box-shadow: 0 0 5px var(--color-secondary), 0 0 10px var(--color-glow-light); }
        }

        /* Modal */
        .modal-dialog {
            position: fixed;
            inset: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            display: grid;
            place-items: center;
            z-index: var(--z-modal);
            padding: 1rem;
            border: none;
        }

        .modal-dialog::backdrop {
            background-color: rgba(1, 2, 13, 0.8);
            backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
        }

        .modal-content {
            position: relative;
            background-color: var(--color-background-med);
            border: 1px solid var(--color-primary);
            padding: clamp(1.5rem, 5vw, 2.5rem);
            border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
            max-width: 700px;
            width: 100%;
            max-height: 90vh;
            overflow-y: auto;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg), 0 0 40px var(--color-primary), 0 0 80px var(--color-secondary);
            opacity: 0;
            transform: translateY(20px) scale(0.98);
            transition: opacity 0.4s var(--ease-out-quart), transform 0.4s var(--ease-out-quart);
        }
        .modal-dialog[open] .modal-content {
            opacity: 1;
            transform: translateY(0) scale(1);
        }
        .modal-close {
            position: absolute;
            top: 1rem;
            right: 1rem;
            background: transparent;
            border: 2px solid transparent;
            color: var(--color-text-primary);
            cursor: pointer;
            width: 44px;
            height: 44px;
            display: grid;
            place-items: center;
            border-radius: 50%;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
            z-index: 1;
        }
        .modal-close:hover {
            color: var(--color-primary);
            background: var(--color-background-light);
            transform: rotate(90deg);
        }
        .modal-close:focus-visible {
            outline: var(--focus-outline-width) solid var(--color-accent);
            outline-offset: var(--focus-outline-offset);
        }
        .modal-content img {
            max-width: 100%;
            height: auto;
            border-radius: var(--radius-md);
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            background-color: var(--color-background-light);
            border: 1px solid rgba(167, 181, 255, 0.2);
            aspect-ratio: 16 / 9;
            object-fit: cover;
        }
        .modal-content h3 {
            color: var(--color-primary);
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
            font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 4vw, 2rem);
            line-height: 1.2;
        }

        /* Timeline */
        .cosmic-timeline {
            position: fixed;
            top: 50%;
            right: 2rem;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            z-index: var(--z-ui);
        }

        .cosmic-timeline-list {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 1.5rem;
            list-style: none;
        }
        .timeline-node {
            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
            appearance: none;
            background-color: transparent;
            border: 2px solid var(--color-primary);
            border-radius: 50%;
            cursor: pointer;
            position: relative;
            transition: background-color 0.3s var(--ease-in-out-cubic), transform 0.3s var(--ease-out-quart);
            display: block;
            padding: 0;
        }
        .timeline-node:hover,
        .timeline-node:focus-visible,
        .timeline-node[aria-current="true"] {
            background-color: var(--color-primary);
            transform: scale(1.3);
            box-shadow: 0 0 15px var(--color-primary);
        }
        .timeline-node:focus-visible { 
            outline: var(--focus-outline-width) solid var(--color-accent);
            outline-offset: var(--focus-outline-offset);
        }
        .timeline-label {
            position: absolute;
            right: 180%;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%) translateX(0.5rem);
            color: var(--color-text-primary);
            background: var(--color-background-med);
            padding: 0.3rem 0.7rem;
            border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
            white-space: nowrap;
            opacity: 0;
            visibility: hidden;
            transition: all 0.3s var(--ease-out-quart);
            pointer-events: none;
            border: 1px solid rgba(167, 181, 255, 0.2);
        }
        .timeline-node:hover .timeline-label,
        .timeline-node:focus-visible .timeline-label {
            opacity: 1;
            visibility: visible;
            transform: translateY(-50%) translateX(-0.5rem);
        }

        /* API Content */
        #api-corner {
            position: fixed;
            top: 1.5rem;
            left: 1.5rem;
            z-index: var(--z-ui);
            background: rgba(10, 11, 26, 0.7);
            backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
            padding: 0.75rem 1.25rem;
            border-radius: var(--radius-md);
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            border: 1px solid rgba(167, 181, 255, 0.2);
            transition: opacity 0.3s, transform 0.3s var(--ease-out-quart);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 0.5rem;
        }
        #apod-container {
            margin-top: 2rem;
            max-width: 500px;
            width: 100%;
            border: 1px solid var(--color-primary);
            padding: 1.5rem;
            border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
            background: rgba(10, 11, 26, 0.5);
            backdrop-filter: blur(3px);
            text-align: left;
            min-height: 200px; /* For loading state */
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: center;
        }
        #apod-container img {
            max-width: 100%;
            border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
        }
        #apod-container figcaption {
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            margin-top: 0.75rem;
            color: var(--color-text-secondary);
            line-height: 1.5;
        }
        #apod-container figcaption strong {
            color: var(--color-secondary);
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
        }

        @keyframes slide-clouds {
            from { transform: translateX(0); }
            to { transform: translateX(-300px); }
        }

        /* UI Elements */
        .scroll-prompt {
            position: fixed;
            bottom: 2rem;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.5rem;
            color: var(--color-primary);
            opacity: 0;
            transition: opacity 0.5s ease;
            z-index: var(--z-ui);
            pointer-events: none;
            animation: fade-in-prompt 1s 2s ease forwards;
        }
        @keyframes fade-in-prompt {
            to { opacity: 1; }
        }
        .scroll-prompt.hidden {
            opacity: 0;
        }
        .scroll-mouse {
            width: 24px;
            height: 40px;
            border: 2px solid var(--color-primary);
            border-radius: 12px;
            position: relative;
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }
        .scroll-wheel {
            width: 4px;
            height: 8px;
            background-color: var(--color-primary);
            border-radius: 2px;
            position: absolute;
            top: 6px;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            animation: scroll-anim 2s infinite;
        }
        @keyframes scroll-anim {
            0% { transform: translate(-50%, 0); opacity: 1; }
            50% { transform: translate(-50%, 10px); opacity: 1; }
            100% { transform: translate(-50%, 20px); opacity: 0; }
        }

        .cta-button {
            background: transparent;
            border: 2px solid var(--color-primary);
            color: var(--color-primary);
            padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem;
            font-size: 1rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            margin-top: 2rem;
            box-shadow: 0 0 5px var(--color-primary), inset 0 0 5px var(--color-primary);
            border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
            font-weight: 700;
            font-family: var(--font-sans);
        }
        .cta-button:hover, .cta-button:focus-visible {
            background-color: var(--color-primary);
            color: var(--color-background-deep);
            box-shadow: 0 0 25px var(--color-primary);
            outline: none;
        }
        .cta-button:focus-visible {
            outline: var(--focus-outline-width) solid var(--color-accent);
            outline-offset: var(--focus-outline-offset);
        }
        .cta-button:active {
            transform: translateY(1px) scale(0.98);
        }


        @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
            *, *::before, *::after {
                animation-delay: -1ms !important;
                animation-duration: 1ms !important;
                animation-iteration-count: 1 !important;
                background-attachment: initial !important;
                scroll-behavior: auto !important;
                transition-delay: 0s !important;
                transition-duration: 0s !important;
            }
        }
        @media (max-width: 1024px) {
            .cosmic-timeline {
                right: 1.5rem;
            }
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .cosmic-timeline {
                display: none; /* Replaced with a different nav concept for mobile */
            }

            #api-corner {
                flex-direction: row;
                flex-wrap: wrap;
                top: 1rem;
                left: 1rem;
                right: 1rem;
                justify-content: center;
            }

            .zoom-layer { padding: 1rem; }
            .zoom-content { gap: 1rem; }

            h2 { font-size: clamp(2rem, 10vw, 3rem); }
            .title { font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 12vw, 4rem); }
        }
    </style>

</head>

    <main id="universe-container" aria-label="Interactive Universe Exploration">

        <section class="zoom-layer" id="intro" aria-labelledby="intro-title">

                <h1 class="title" id="intro-title">The Universe</h1>
                <p class="subtitle">An infinite journey awaits.</p>
                <figure id="apod-container" role="figure" aria-labelledby="apod-caption" aria-live="polite">

        <section class="zoom-layer" id="galaxy" aria-labelledby="galaxy-title">

                    <button class="poi" data-poi="sag-a" style="--poi-top: var(--poi-sag-a-top); --poi-left: var(--poi-sag-a-left);" aria-label="Point of Interest: Sagittarius A*"></button>
                </div>
